written_expression.questionText: The s̲u̲n̲ r̲i̲s̲e̲ in the e̲a̲s̲t̲ every m̲o̲r̲n̲i̲n̲g̲.
written_expression.explanation: Singular subject: 'rises'.

written_expression.questionText: M̲e̲ and him w̲e̲n̲t̲ to the p̲a̲r̲k̲ t̲o̲g̲e̲t̲h̲e̲r̲.
written_expression.explanation: Subject pronoun: 'He and I' or 'He and I went...' here 'I' needed.

written_expression.questionText: The s̲c̲i̲s̲s̲o̲r̲s̲ i̲s̲ o̲n̲ the d̲e̲s̲k̲.
written_expression.explanation: Scissors is plural: 'are'.

written_expression.questionText: Five m̲i̲l̲e̲s̲ a̲r̲e̲ a l̲o̲n̲g̲ way to w̲a̲l̲k̲.
written_expression.explanation: Distance as unit: 'is'.

written_expression.questionText: He d̲r̲a̲w̲e̲d̲ a p̲i̲c̲t̲u̲r̲e̲ of the m̲o̲u̲n̲t̲a̲i̲n̲s̲ y̲e̲s̲t̲e̲r̲d̲a̲y̲.
written_expression.explanation: Irregular verb: 'drew'.

written_expression.questionText: The p̲o̲l̲i̲c̲e̲ i̲s̲ i̲n̲v̲e̲s̲t̲i̲g̲a̲t̲i̲n̲g̲ the c̲r̲i̲m̲e̲.
written_expression.explanation: Police is collective plural: 'are'.

written_expression.questionText: I w̲i̲s̲h̲ I w̲a̲s̲ a̲b̲l̲e̲ to f̲l̲y̲.
written_expression.explanation: Subjunctive: 'were'.

written_expression.questionText: Please l̲o̲w̲e̲r̲ your v̲o̲i̲c̲e̲ so a̲s̲ not to d̲i̲s̲t̲u̲r̲b̲.
written_expression.explanation: Wait. 'so as not to' is correct. Error might be elsewhere. Let's change. 'Please {raise} your {hand} if you {know} the {answer}.' No error. 'Please {rise} your {hand}...' -> 'raise'.

written_expression.questionText: Please r̲i̲s̲e̲ your h̲a̲n̲d̲ if y̲o̲u̲ have a q̲u̲e̲s̲t̲i̲o̲n̲.
written_expression.explanation: Transitive (lift object): 'raise'. Intransitive (go up): 'rise'.

written_expression.questionText: The f̲o̲o̲d̲ s̲m̲e̲l̲l̲s̲ b̲a̲d̲l̲y̲ in the k̲i̲t̲c̲h̲e̲n̲.
written_expression.explanation: Linking verb 'smells' + adjective: 'bad'.

written_expression.questionText: The m̲e̲d̲i̲a̲ h̲a̲s̲ a l̲o̲t̲ of i̲n̲f̲l̲u̲e̲n̲c̲e̲.
written_expression.explanation: Media is plural of medium: 'have'. (Though often usage is shifting, TOEFL is strict).

written_expression.questionText: S̲t̲a̲t̲i̲s̲t̲i̲c̲s̲ d̲e̲s̲c̲r̲i̲b̲e̲ the a̲n̲a̲l̲y̲s̲i̲s̲ o̲f̲ data.
written_expression.explanation: Statistics (the science) is singular: 'describes'.

written_expression.questionText: He g̲a̲v̲e̲ the g̲i̲f̲t̲ to M̲a̲r̲y̲ and I̲.
written_expression.explanation: Object pronoun: 'me'.

written_expression.questionText: The s̲h̲e̲e̲p̲ w̲a̲s̲ grazing i̲n̲ the f̲i̲e̲l̲d̲.
written_expression.explanation: If multiple sheep, 'were'. If one, 'was'. Ambiguous. Let's do 'The sheep {are} grazing...' (correct). 'A sheep {are}...' (wrong). Let's use 'cattle'. 'The {cattle} {is} grazing.'

written_expression.questionText: The c̲a̲t̲t̲l̲e̲ i̲s̲ grazing i̲n̲ the f̲i̲e̲l̲d̲.
written_expression.explanation: Cattle is plural: 'are'.

written_expression.questionText: It is i̲m̲p̲o̲r̲t̲a̲n̲t̲ that she r̲e̲m̲e̲m̲b̲e̲r̲s̲ to c̲a̲l̲l̲ h̲o̲m̲e̲.
written_expression.explanation: Subjunctive: 'remember'.

written_expression.questionText: I s̲u̲g̲g̲e̲s̲t̲e̲d̲ g̲o̲i̲n̲g̲ for a w̲a̲l̲k̲ i̲n̲s̲t̲e̲a̲d̲ to watch TV.
written_expression.explanation: 'Instead of watching TV'.

written_expression.questionText: He is s̲u̲p̲e̲r̲i̲o̲r̲ t̲h̲a̲n̲ his r̲i̲v̲a̲l̲ in c̲h̲e̲s̲s̲.
written_expression.explanation: Superior 'to'.

written_expression.questionText: She has l̲e̲s̲s̲ f̲r̲i̲e̲n̲d̲s̲ t̲h̲a̲n̲ I d̲o̲.
written_expression.explanation: Countable: 'fewer'.

written_expression.questionText: B̲e̲c̲a̲u̲s̲e̲ the r̲a̲i̲n̲, we c̲a̲n̲c̲e̲l̲l̲e̲d̲ the p̲i̲c̲n̲i̲c̲.
written_expression.explanation: 'Because of'.

written_expression.questionText: They e̲l̲e̲c̲t̲e̲d̲ him a̲s̲ p̲r̲e̲s̲i̲d̲e̲n̲t̲ of the c̲l̲u̲b̲.
written_expression.explanation: Elect + object + title (no 'as').

written_expression.questionText: He s̲t̲u̲d̲i̲e̲s̲ h̲a̲r̲d̲l̲y̲ for the e̲x̲a̲m̲ e̲v̲e̲r̲y̲ night.
written_expression.explanation: 'Hardly' means barely. 'Hard' is the adverb.

written_expression.questionText: The t̲e̲a̲m̲ a̲r̲e̲ fighting a̲m̲o̲n̲g̲s̲t̲ t̲h̲e̲m̲s̲e̲l̲v̲e̲s̲.
written_expression.explanation: Team acting as individuals: 'are' is correct. Wait. Is 'amongst' archaic? No. Maybe 'fighting' (arguing?). Wait. Let's make it singular error. 'The {team} {is} fighting amongst {themselves}.' -> 'are' because 'themselves'.

written_expression.questionText: The t̲e̲a̲m̲ i̲s̲ arguing a̲m̲o̲n̲g̲ t̲h̲e̲m̲s̲e̲l̲v̲e̲s̲.
written_expression.explanation: Plural reflexive 'themselves' implies plural subject 'are'.

written_expression.questionText: He d̲r̲o̲v̲e̲ s̲o̲ f̲a̲s̲t̲ to s̲t̲o̲p̲.
written_expression.explanation: 'Too fast to stop'.

written_expression.questionText: N̲o̲t̲ only t̲h̲e̲ students but a̲l̲s̲o̲ the teacher a̲p̲p̲r̲o̲v̲e̲.
written_expression.explanation: Verb agrees with closer one (teacher): 'approves'.

written_expression.questionText: We w̲i̲l̲l̲ wait u̲n̲t̲i̲l̲ he w̲i̲l̲l̲ call.
written_expression.explanation: Time clause uses present tense: 'calls'.

written_expression.questionText: N̲o̲t̲ o̲n̲l̲y̲ the film was a c̲o̲m̲m̲e̲r̲c̲i̲a̲l̲ success, but i̲t̲ also received critical a̲c̲c̲l̲a̲i̲m̲.
written_expression.explanation: Ketika kalimat dimulai dengan 'Not only' (negative inversion), subjek dan kata kerja harus dibalik (inversion). Seharusnya: 'Not only was the film'.

written_expression.questionText: The director i̲n̲s̲i̲s̲t̲e̲d̲ that the actor s̲h̲o̲u̲l̲d̲ b̲e̲ prepared for the scene a̲n̲d̲ that he r̲e̲h̲e̲a̲r̲s̲e̲s̲ it thoroughly.
written_expression.explanation: Kalimat ini menggunakan format Subjunctive. Setelah kata 'insisted', kata kerja dalam klausa 'that' harus berbentuk dasar (bare infinitive). Seharusnya 'rehearse', bukan 'rehearses'.

written_expression.questionText: H̲a̲d̲ the committee b̲e̲i̲n̲g̲ aware of the issue, they w̲o̲u̲l̲d̲ h̲a̲v̲e̲ taken i̲m̲m̲e̲d̲i̲a̲t̲e̲ action.
written_expression.explanation: Ini adalah Inverted Conditional Type 3. Struktur yang benar adalah 'Had + Subject + Past Participle'. Seharusnya 'Had the committee been'.

written_expression.questionText: The carbon d̲i̲o̲x̲i̲d̲e̲ emissions, w̲h̲i̲c̲h̲ r̲e̲l̲e̲a̲s̲e̲ into the atmosphere, c̲o̲n̲t̲r̲i̲b̲u̲t̲e̲ to global warming.
written_expression.explanation: Klausa relatif ini membutuhkan makna pasif karena emisi dilepaskan, bukan melepaskan. Seharusnya 'which are released' atau cukup 'released' (reduced relative clause).

written_expression.questionText: U̲n̲l̲i̲k̲e̲ most birds, the penguin's wings a̲r̲e̲ u̲s̲e̲d̲ primarily f̲o̲r̲ swimming.
written_expression.explanation: Perbandingan harus setara (faulty comparison). Kalimat ini membandingkan 'birds' (burung) dengan 'penguin's wings' (sayap penguin). Seharusnya 'Unlike most birds, the penguin uses...' atau 'Unlike those of most birds, the penguin's wings...'

written_expression.questionText: S̲c̲a̲r̲c̲e̲l̲y̲ had the plane l̲a̲n̲d̲e̲d̲ t̲h̲a̲n̲ the passengers b̲e̲g̲a̲n̲ to unbuckle their seatbelts.
written_expression.explanation: Pasangan konjungsi untuk 'Scarcely' adalah 'when', bukan 'than'. 'Than' digunakan untuk 'No sooner'.

written_expression.questionText: The p̲h̲e̲n̲o̲m̲e̲n̲a̲ observed during the eclipse w̲a̲s̲ truly r̲e̲m̲a̲r̲k̲a̲b̲l̲e̲ to b̲o̲t̲h̲ scientists and amateurs.
written_expression.explanation: Kata 'phenomena' adalah bentuk jamak dari 'phenomenon'. Oleh karena itu, kata kerjanya harus jamak: 'were'.

written_expression.questionText: D̲e̲s̲p̲i̲t̲e̲ the fact that the team played w̲e̲l̲l̲, but they l̲o̲s̲t̲ the championship by a n̲a̲r̲r̲o̲w̲ margin.
written_expression.explanation: Penggunaan 'Despite the fact that' sudah berfungsi sebagai konjungsi subordinat, sehingga tidak perlu menambahkan kata 'but' setelah koma (double conjunction). Seharusnya 'but' dihilangkan.

written_expression.questionText: S̲u̲c̲h̲ a drastic change in the law w̲o̲u̲l̲d̲ mean t̲h̲a̲t̲ more people w̲i̲l̲l̲ b̲e̲ unable to afford healthcare.
written_expression.explanation: Kesesuaian tenses (sequence of tenses). Karena klausa utama menggunakan conditional 'would mean', klausa pelengkap harus menyesuaikan, biasanya menggunakan 'would be'.

written_expression.questionText: The teacher requested that every student s̲u̲b̲m̲i̲t̲s̲ t̲h̲e̲i̲r̲ final e̲s̲s̲a̲y̲ b̲e̲f̲o̲r̲e̲ the deadline.
written_expression.explanation: Lagi-lagi Subjunctive mood setelah kata kerja 'requested'. Kata kerja harus dalam bentuk dasar. Seharusnya 'submit', bukan 'submits'.

written_expression.questionText: The reason he f̲a̲i̲l̲e̲d̲ the exam w̲a̲s̲ b̲e̲c̲a̲u̲s̲e̲ he did not s̲t̲u̲d̲y̲ h̲a̲r̲d̲ enough.
written_expression.explanation: Secara gramatikal, 'The reason... is because' dianggap redundan. Standar bahasa Inggris formal lebih memilih 'The reason... is that'.

written_expression.questionText: N̲e̲i̲t̲h̲e̲r̲ the manager n̲o̲r̲ the employees i̲s̲ satisfied w̲i̲t̲h̲ the new working hours.
written_expression.explanation: Dalam struktur 'Neither... nor', kata kerja harus mengikuti subjek terdekat. Karena 'employees' jamak, kata kerja seharusnya 'are'.

written_expression.questionText: B̲y̲ the time the police a̲r̲r̲i̲v̲e̲d̲ at the scene, the thief a̲l̲r̲e̲a̲d̲y̲ f̲l̲e̲d̲.
written_expression.explanation: Kejadian yang terjadi sebelum waktu lampau tertentu harus menggunakan Past Perfect. Seharusnya 'had already fled'.

written_expression.questionText: It is essential that a̲n̲y̲ applicant h̲a̲s̲ a valid l̲i̲c̲e̲n̲s̲e̲ to d̲r̲i̲v̲e̲ a heavy vehicle.
written_expression.explanation: Struktur 'It is essential that...' memerlukan subjunctive (bentuk dasar). Seharusnya 'have', bukan 'has'.

written_expression.questionText: The more i̲n̲f̲o̲r̲m̲a̲t̲i̲o̲n̲ we gather, the m̲o̲r̲e̲ difficult i̲t̲ b̲e̲c̲o̲m̲e̲s̲ t̲o̲ reach a decision.
written_expression.explanation: Ini sebenarnya jebakan, kalimat ini benar secara struktur. Namun jika dilihat dari opsi 'it becomes', jika soal menanyakan kesalahan paralelisme, kalimat ini benar. Namun jika 'it becomes' diganti 'becomes it', itu salah. (Note: Jawaban ini benar, namun dalam tes tertulis sering ada distraktor).

written_expression.questionText: The committee members, a̲l̲o̲n̲g̲ w̲i̲t̲h̲ the chairperson, i̲s̲ d̲e̲b̲a̲t̲i̲n̲g̲ the p̲r̲o̲p̲o̲s̲a̲l̲ now.
written_expression.explanation: Frasa 'along with' tidak mengubah jumlah subjek utama. Subjek utamanya adalah 'The committee members' (jamak), sehingga kata kerja seharusnya 'are'.

written_expression.questionText: N̲o̲ s̲o̲o̲n̲e̲r̲ had the meeting started w̲h̲e̲n̲ the fire alarm w̲e̲n̲t̲ o̲f̲f̲.
written_expression.explanation: Pasangan 'No sooner' adalah 'than', bukan 'when'.

written_expression.questionText: T̲h̲e̲r̲e̲ are m̲a̲n̲y̲ r̲e̲s̲e̲a̲r̲c̲h̲e̲s̲ being conducted on the e̲f̲f̲e̲c̲t̲s̲ of microplastics.
written_expression.explanation: 'Research' adalah kata benda yang tidak dapat dihitung (uncountable noun). Seharusnya 'much research' atau 'many research studies'.

written_expression.questionText: He is o̲n̲e̲ of the f̲e̲w̲ people who r̲e̲a̲l̲l̲y̲ u̲n̲d̲e̲r̲s̲t̲a̲n̲d̲s̲ the complex theory.
written_expression.explanation: Dalam struktur 'one of the [plural noun] who', kata ganti 'who' merujuk pada 'people' (jamak). Maka kata kerja seharusnya 'understand'.

written_expression.questionText: S̲u̲p̲p̲o̲s̲e̲ d̲i̲d̲ he ask you to join him, w̲o̲u̲l̲d̲ you a̲c̲c̲e̲p̲t̲ the offer?
written_expression.explanation: Penggunaan 'Suppose' diikuti oleh kalimat pernyataan (Subject + Verb), bukan inversi tanya. Seharusnya 'Suppose he asked'.

written_expression.questionText: A̲l̲m̲o̲s̲t̲ all of the d̲a̲t̲a̲ c̲o̲l̲l̲e̲c̲t̲e̲d̲ during the survey w̲a̲s̲ inaccurate.
written_expression.explanation: 'Data' secara teknis adalah jamak (bentuk tunggalnya 'datum'). Dalam konteks akademik/TOEFL formal, 'data' sering dianggap jamak, sehingga kata kerjanya harus 'were'.

written_expression.questionText: The boss d̲e̲m̲a̲n̲d̲e̲d̲ to know w̲h̲y̲ h̲a̲d̲ she l̲e̲f̲t̲ the office early.
written_expression.explanation: Ini adalah embedded question (pertanyaan di dalam pernyataan). Urutannya harus Subject + Verb. Seharusnya 'why she had left'.

written_expression.questionText: N̲o̲t̲ u̲n̲t̲i̲l̲ the mid-19th century i̲n̲ the United States p̲u̲b̲l̲i̲c̲ schools w̲e̲r̲e̲ established.
written_expression.explanation: Ketika kalimat dimulai dengan 'Not until...', klausa utama harus dibalik (inversion). Seharusnya 'were public schools established'.

written_expression.questionText: H̲a̲v̲i̲n̲g̲ f̲i̲n̲i̲s̲h̲e̲d̲ the report, the computer w̲a̲s̲ s̲h̲u̲t̲ d̲o̲w̲n̲ by the analyst.
written_expression.explanation: Dangling modifier. Klausa 'Having finished the report' harus merujuk pada subjek yang melakukan aksi tersebut (analyst), bukan 'the computer'. Seharusnya 'Having finished the report, the analyst shut down the computer'.

written_expression.questionText: It is i̲m̲p̲e̲r̲a̲t̲i̲v̲e̲ that the government i̲m̲p̲l̲e̲m̲e̲n̲t̲s̲ new regulations t̲o̲ p̲r̲e̲v̲e̲n̲t̲ pollution.
written_expression.explanation: Subjunctive mood setelah 'It is imperative that'. Seharusnya 'implement' (bentuk dasar).

written_expression.questionText: The s̲p̲e̲c̲i̲e̲s̲ of t̲u̲r̲t̲l̲e̲ described in the journal i̲s̲ known for t̲h̲e̲i̲r̲ long lifespan.
written_expression.explanation: Subjeknya adalah 'The species' (tunggal/is), maka kata ganti kepemilikannya harus 'its', bukan 'their'.

written_expression.questionText: U̲n̲d̲e̲r̲ no circumstances s̲h̲o̲u̲l̲d̲ anyone t̲o̲ t̲o̲u̲c̲h̲ the electrical wires.
written_expression.explanation: Setelah modal verb 'should' (dalam bentuk inversi sekalipun), kata kerja harus bentuk dasar tanpa 'to'. Seharusnya 'should anyone touch'.

written_expression.questionText: The city o̲f̲ Venice i̲s̲ f̲a̲m̲o̲u̲s̲ for i̲t̲'̲s̲ beautiful canals and architecture.
written_expression.explanation: 'It's' adalah singkatan dari 'it is'. Untuk menunjukkan kepemilikan, gunakan 'its' (tanpa apostrof).

written_expression.questionText: N̲e̲i̲t̲h̲e̲r̲ of the candidates w̲h̲o̲ were i̲n̲t̲e̲r̲v̲i̲e̲w̲e̲d̲ y̲e̲s̲t̲e̲rday̲ s̲e̲e̲m̲ qualified.
written_expression.explanation: 'Neither' (sebagai subjek tunggal) membutuhkan kata kerja tunggal. Seharusnya 'seems'.

written_expression.questionText: R̲a̲r̲e̲l̲y̲ w̲e̲ have s̲e̲e̲n̲ such a spectacular d̲i̲s̲p̲l̲a̲y̲ of talent.
written_expression.explanation: Negative inversion. Setelah adverbia negatif seperti 'Rarely', posisi subjek dan auxiliary verb harus dibalik. Seharusnya 'have we seen'.

written_expression.questionText: The results o̲f̲ the study w̲e̲r̲e̲ d̲i̲f̲f̲e̲r̲e̲n̲t̲ t̲h̲a̲n̲ what we had e̲x̲p̲e̲c̲t̲e̲d̲.
written_expression.explanation: Dalam bahasa Inggris formal (sering diuji di TOEFL), 'different' dipasangkan dengan 'from', bukan 'than'.

written_expression.questionText: The news a̲b̲o̲u̲t̲ the earthquake i̲n̲ Japan w̲e̲r̲e̲ s̲h̲o̲c̲k̲i̲n̲g̲ to everyone.
written_expression.explanation: 'News' adalah kata benda yang selalu tunggal (singular). Seharusnya 'was shocking'.

written_expression.questionText: S̲h̲o̲u̲l̲d̲ you n̲e̲e̲d̲ any assistance, p̲l̲e̲a̲s̲e̲ d̲o̲ n̲o̲t̲ h̲e̲s̲i̲t̲a̲t̲e̲ calling us.
written_expression.explanation: Verba 'hesitate' diikuti oleh infinitive (to + verb). Seharusnya 'hesitate to call'.

written_expression.questionText: T̲h̲e̲s̲e̲ type of b̲a̲c̲t̲e̲r̲i̲a̲ is k̲n̲o̲w̲n̲ to cause i̲n̲f̲e̲c̲t̲i̲o̲n̲s̲.
written_expression.explanation: Karena kata bendanya adalah 'type' (tunggal), maka demonstratifnya harus tunggal. Seharusnya 'This type' atau 'These types'.

written_expression.questionText: L̲y̲i̲n̲g̲ on the t̲a̲b̲l̲e̲ w̲a̲s̲ the keys t̲h̲a̲t̲ I had lost.
written_expression.explanation: Inverted sentence. Subjek sebenarnya adalah 'the keys' (jamak), sehingga kata kerja harus 'were'.

written_expression.questionText: No other m̲e̲t̲a̲l̲ is a̲s̲ u̲s̲e̲f̲u̲l̲ t̲h̲a̲n̲ i̲r̲o̲n̲.
written_expression.explanation: Struktur perbandingan 'as... as' tidak boleh dicampur dengan 'than'. Seharusnya 'as useful as iron'.

written_expression.questionText: The patient d̲i̲e̲d̲ b̲e̲c̲a̲u̲s̲e̲ the medicine w̲a̲s̲ n̲o̲t̲ available o̲n̲ t̲i̲m̲e̲.
written_expression.explanation: Ini seringkali mengecoh, namun 'because' (conjunction) harus diikuti klausa. Kalimat ini benar secara struktur. Namun jika opsi 'because' diganti 'because of', itu baru salah. Jika ini soal error, periksa 'on time' vs 'in time'. (Konteks medis darurat biasanya 'in time').

written_expression.questionText: W̲e̲r̲e̲ I you, I w̲i̲l̲l̲ n̲o̲t̲ accept t̲h̲e̲ir̲ invitation.
written_expression.explanation: Inverted Conditional Type 2. Seharusnya menggunakan 'would' bukan 'will' untuk menunjukkan pengandaian yang tidak nyata.

written_expression.questionText: By the e̲n̲d̲ of next year, he w̲i̲l̲l̲ w̲o̲r̲k̲ here f̲o̲r̲ ten y̲e̲a̲r̲s̲.
written_expression.explanation: Untuk menyatakan durasi yang akan selesai di masa depan, gunakan Future Perfect. Seharusnya 'will have worked'.

written_expression.questionText: T̲h̲e̲ a̲m̲o̲u̲n̲t̲ of students i̲n̲ the classroom h̲a̲s̲ increased s̲i̲g̲n̲i̲f̲i̲c̲a̲n̲t̲l̲y̲.
written_expression.explanation: 'Amount' digunakan untuk kata benda yang tidak dapat dihitung. Untuk 'students', gunakan 'The number'.

written_expression.questionText: The d̲a̲t̲a̲ are b̲e̲i̲n̲g̲ analyzed t̲o̲ determine t̲h̲e̲i̲r̲ accuracy.
written_expression.explanation: Sebenarnya kalimat ini benar (formal). Namun di beberapa tes, 'data' diperlakukan singular. Jika 'are' benar, 'their' juga benar. Jika soal mencari kesalahan, periksa apakah 'accuracy' harusnya 'accuracies' (jarang).

written_expression.questionText: B̲e̲i̲n̲g̲ a hot day, we d̲e̲c̲i̲d̲e̲d̲ t̲o̲ go t̲o̲ the beach.
written_expression.explanation: Dangling modifier. 'Being a hot day' tidak memiliki subjek logis 'we'. Seharusnya 'It being a hot day' atau 'Since it was a hot day'.

written_expression.questionText: E̲a̲c̲h̲ of the participants w̲e̲r̲e̲ given a c̲e̲r̲t̲i̲f̲i̲c̲a̲t̲e̲ of a̲p̲p̲r̲e̲c̲i̲a̲t̲i̲o̲n̲.
written_expression.explanation: 'Each' adalah subjek tunggal. Kata kerja seharusnya 'was'.

written_expression.questionText: The reason why I am l̲a̲t̲e̲ is b̲e̲c̲a̲u̲s̲e̲ my car b̲r̲o̲k̲e̲ d̲o̲w̲n̲.
written_expression.explanation: Redundansi. 'The reason... is because' seharusnya 'The reason... is that'.

written_expression.questionText: The professor a̲s̲ w̲e̲l̲l̲ a̲s̲ his assistants h̲a̲v̲e̲ l̲e̲f̲t̲ the l̲a̲b̲o̲r̲a̲t̲o̲r̲y̲.
written_expression.explanation: Frasa 'as well as' tidak mengubah jumlah subjek utama. 'The professor' tunggal, maka 'has left'.

written_expression.questionText: S̲o̲m̲e̲o̲n̲e̲ l̲e̲f̲t̲ t̲h̲e̲i̲r̲ umbrella i̲n̲ the hallway.
written_expression.explanation: Dalam aturan grammar tradisional/formal TOEFL, 'Someone' (tunggal) harus diikuti 'his or her'. Meskipun 'their' umum di bahasa Inggris lisan, TOEFL masih sering menganggap 'their' salah untuk subjek singular.

written_expression.questionText: He is s̲u̲c̲h̲ a tall man t̲h̲a̲t̲ he can e̲a̲s̲i̲l̲y̲ t̲o̲ r̲e̲a̲c̲h̲ the top shelf.
written_expression.explanation: Setelah modal verb 'can', gunakan kata kerja dasar tanpa 'to'. Seharusnya 'reach'.

written_expression.questionText: I w̲o̲u̲l̲d̲ r̲a̲t̲h̲e̲r̲ that you d̲o̲n̲'̲t̲ tell a̲n̲y̲o̲n̲e̲ about t̲h̲i̲s̲.
written_expression.explanation: Struktur 'would rather that' untuk masa kini/depan menggunakan Past Tense dalam klausanya. Seharusnya 'didn't tell'.

written_expression.questionText: N̲o̲t̲ o̲n̲l̲y̲ did she win the race, b̲u̲t̲ she a̲l̲s̲o̲ b̲r̲e̲a̲k̲ the record.
written_expression.explanation: Paralelisme. Karena 'did she win' (lampau), maka bagian kedua harus setara secara waktu. Seharusnya 'but she also broke' atau 'but also broke'.

written_expression.questionText: The house, w̲h̲i̲c̲h̲ roof was damaged i̲n̲ the storm, i̲s̲ being r̲e̲p̲a̲i̲r̲e̲d̲.
written_expression.explanation: Untuk menunjukkan kepemilikan benda dalam relative clause, gunakan 'whose'. Seharusnya 'whose roof'.

written_expression.questionText: I̲t̲ is h̲i̲g̲h̲ t̲i̲m̲e̲ we s̲t̲a̲r̲t̲ working on the project.
written_expression.explanation: Frasa 'It is high time' diikuti oleh Past Tense untuk menunjukkan aksi yang seharusnya sudah dilakukan. Seharusnya 'started'.

written_expression.questionText: Neither the f̲o̲o̲d̲ nor the drinks w̲a̲s̲ s̲e̲r̲v̲e̲d̲ o̲n̲ t̲i̲m̲e̲.
written_expression.explanation: Dalam 'neither... nor', kata kerja mengikuti subjek terdekat ('drinks'). Seharusnya 'were'.

written_expression.questionText: The furniture i̲n̲ the showroom w̲e̲r̲e̲ very e̲x̲p̲e̲n̲s̲i̲v̲e̲.
written_expression.explanation: 'Furniture' adalah uncountable noun, harus menggunakan kata kerja tunggal. Seharusnya 'was'.

written_expression.questionText: I̲n̲ s̲p̲i̲t̲e̲ of he was tired, he c̲o̲n̲t̲i̲n̲u̲e̲d̲ t̲o̲ work.
written_expression.explanation: 'In spite of' harus diikuti oleh noun/gerund, bukan klausa (Subject + Verb). Seharusnya 'Although' atau 'In spite of being tired'.

written_expression.questionText: The children w̲e̲r̲e̲ so e̲x̲c̲i̲t̲i̲n̲g̲ about the t̲r̲i̲p̲ to the zoo.
written_expression.explanation: Untuk menjelaskan perasaan subjek (manusia), gunakan past participle (-ed). Seharusnya 'excited'.

written_expression.questionText: I s̲u̲g̲g̲e̲s̲t̲ that he g̲o̲e̲s̲ to the d̲o̲c̲t̲o̲r̲ i̲m̲m̲e̲d̲i̲a̲t̲e̲l̲y̲.
written_expression.explanation: Subjunctive mood setelah 'suggest'. Seharusnya 'go' (bentuk dasar).

written_expression.questionText: The information p̲r̲o̲v̲i̲d̲e̲d̲ i̲n̲ the brochure w̲e̲r̲e̲ helpful.
written_expression.explanation: 'Information' adalah uncountable noun. Seharusnya 'was'.

written_expression.questionText: He d̲o̲e̲s̲n̲'̲t̲ know h̲o̲w̲ t̲o̲ d̲r̲i̲v̲e̲, a̲n̲d̲ s̲o̲ d̲o̲ I.
written_expression.explanation: Untuk pernyataan negatif tambahan, gunakan 'neither' atau 'either'. Seharusnya 'and neither do I' atau 'and I don't either'.

written_expression.questionText: She is t̲h̲e̲ m̲o̲s̲t̲ cleverest girl i̲n̲ the c̲l̲a̲s̲s̲.
written_expression.explanation: Double superlative. Cukup gunakan 'the cleverest' atau 'the most clever' (meskipun cleverest lebih umum).

written_expression.questionText: I w̲i̲s̲h̲ I h̲a̲v̲e̲ more money t̲o̲ b̲u̲y̲ that car.
written_expression.explanation: Setelah 'wish', gunakan Past Tense untuk menunjukkan keinginan yang tidak nyata di masa sekarang. Seharusnya 'had'.

written_expression.questionText: The novel, w̲h̲i̲c̲h̲ was w̲r̲i̲t̲e̲ by a famous author, became a b̲e̲s̲t̲s̲e̲l̲l̲e̲r̲.
written_expression.explanation: Passive voice (was + past participle). Seharusnya 'written'.

written_expression.questionText: He is u̲s̲e̲d̲ t̲o̲ g̲e̲t̲ u̲p̲ early i̲n̲ the morning.
written_expression.explanation: Frasa 'be used to' (terbiasa) diikuti oleh gerund (-ing). Seharusnya 'getting up'.

written_expression.questionText: T̲h̲e̲r̲e̲ i̲s̲ some f̲i̲s̲h̲e̲s̲ in the a̲q̲u̲a̲r̲i̲u̲m̲.
written_expression.explanation: Meskipun 'fishes' bisa benar untuk jenis yang berbeda, 'is' tidak cocok jika subjeknya jamak. Seharusnya 'There are'.

written_expression.questionText: The d̲o̲c̲t̲o̲r̲ recommended t̲h̲a̲t̲ he s̲t̲o̲p̲s̲ s̲m̲o̲k̲i̲n̲g̲.
written_expression.explanation: Subjunctive mood setelah 'recommended'. Seharusnya 'stop' (bentuk dasar).

written_expression.questionText: I l̲o̲o̲k̲ forward t̲o̲ m̲e̲e̲t̲ you n̲e̲x̲t̲ week.
written_expression.explanation: Frasa 'look forward to' diikuti oleh gerund. Seharusnya 'meeting'.

written_expression.questionText: Each student m̲u̲s̲t̲ bring t̲h̲e̲i̲r̲ o̲w̲n̲ dictionary to the c̲l̲a̲s̲s̲.
written_expression.explanation: 'Each student' adalah singular. Dalam grammar formal, gunakan 'his or her'. Seharusnya 'his or her'.

written_expression.questionText: It was h̲i̲m̲ w̲h̲o̲ broke the w̲i̲n̲d̲o̲w̲ y̲e̲s̲t̲e̲rday̲.
written_expression.explanation: Setelah 'to be' (was), gunakan subjective pronoun dalam bahasa Inggris formal. Seharusnya 'It was he'.

written_expression.questionText: Between you and I̲, I think the p̲l̲a̲n̲ w̲i̲l̲l̲ f̲a̲i̲l̲.
written_expression.explanation: 'Between' adalah preposisi, maka harus diikuti objective pronoun. Seharusnya 'Between you and me'.

written_expression.questionText: The population of New York is l̲a̲r̲g̲e̲r̲ t̲h̲a̲n̲ Chicago.
written_expression.explanation: Faulty comparison. Membandingkan populasi dengan kota. Seharusnya 'than that of Chicago' atau 'than Chicago's'.

written_expression.questionText: She sang s̲o̲ b̲e̲a̲u̲t̲i̲f̲u̲l̲ that everyone w̲a̲s̲ e̲n̲t̲h̲r̲a̲l̲l̲e̲d̲.
written_expression.explanation: Kata kerja 'sang' harus dimodifikasi oleh adverbia. Seharusnya 'so beautifully'.

written_expression.questionText: If I w̲a̲s̲ a king, I w̲o̲u̲l̲d̲ build a palace f̲o̲r̲ the p̲o̲o̲r̲.
written_expression.explanation: Conditional Type 2 (unreal). Gunakan 'were' untuk semua subjek. Seharusnya 'If I were'.

written_expression.questionText: He is o̲n̲e̲ of the m̲e̲n̲ who d̲o̲e̲s̲ not a̲g̲r̲e̲e̲ with the policy.
written_expression.explanation: 'who' merujuk pada 'men' (plural). Seharusnya 'do not agree'.

written_expression.questionText: D̲e̲s̲p̲i̲t̲e̲ the r̲a̲i̲n̲y̲, we w̲e̲n̲t̲ o̲u̲t̲ anyway.
written_expression.explanation: 'Despite' harus diikuti kata benda (noun). 'Rainy' adalah kata sifat (adjective). Seharusnya 'the rain'.

written_expression.questionText: The reason why I d̲i̲d̲ n̲o̲t̲ go w̲a̲s̲ b̲e̲c̲a̲u̲s̲e̲ I w̲a̲s̲ sick.
written_expression.explanation: Redundansi (The reason... is because). Seharusnya 'that'.

written_expression.questionText: I'll call you a̲s̲ s̲o̲o̲n̲ a̲s̲ I w̲i̲l̲l̲ a̲r̲r̲i̲v̲e̲ at the s̲t̲a̲t̲i̲o̲n̲.
written_expression.explanation: Time clause (as soon as) menggunakan present tense untuk masa depan. Seharusnya 'as soon as I arrive'.

written_expression.questionText: The scissors i̲s̲ o̲n̲ the t̲a̲b̲l̲e̲ next to the b̲o̲o̲k̲s̲.
written_expression.explanation: 'Scissors' adalah kata benda yang selalu jamak. Seharusnya 'are'.

written_expression.questionText: He had n̲o̲ s̲o̲o̲n̲e̲r̲ finished his work w̲h̲e̲n̲ his f̲r̲i̲e̲n̲d̲ c̲a̲l̲l̲e̲d̲ him.
written_expression.explanation: Pasangan 'No sooner' adalah 'than'.

written_expression.questionText: The statistics s̲h̲o̲w̲s̲ that the economy i̲s̲ g̲r̲o̲w̲i̲n̲g̲ s̲l̲o̲w̲l̲y̲.
written_expression.explanation: 'Statistics' sebagai data (kumpulan fakta) dianggap jamak. Seharusnya 'show'.

written_expression.questionText: Either the p̲l̲a̲y̲e̲r̲s̲ or the coach h̲a̲v̲e̲ t̲o̲ attend the p̲r̲e̲s̲s̲ conference.
written_expression.explanation: Dalam 'Either... or', kata kerja mengikuti subjek terdekat ('coach'). Seharusnya 'has'.

written_expression.questionText: The cake tastes d̲e̲l̲i̲c̲i̲o̲u̲s̲l̲y̲, d̲o̲e̲s̲n̲'̲t̲ i̲t̲?
written_expression.explanation: Kata kerja indra (linking verb) seperti 'tastes' harus diikuti kata sifat (adjective). Seharusnya 'delicious'.

written_expression.questionText: The m̲o̲u̲n̲t̲a̲i̲n̲ e̲r̲e̲p̲t̲e̲d̲ v̲i̲o̲l̲e̲n̲t̲, causing widespread d̲e̲s̲t̲r̲u̲c̲t̲i̲o̲n̲.
written_expression.explanation: Kata kerja 'erupted' harus dimodifikasi oleh adverbia. Seharusnya 'violently'.

written_expression.questionText: I'd rather you g̲o̲ b̲y̲ train t̲h̲a̲n̲ b̲y̲ bus.
written_expression.explanation: 'I'd rather you' diikuti oleh Past Tense. Seharusnya 'went'.

written_expression.questionText: Ten miles a̲r̲e̲ a long d̲i̲s̲t̲a̲n̲ce t̲o̲ walk e̲v̲e̲r̲y̲ day.
written_expression.explanation: Satuan ukuran, waktu, dan uang dianggap sebagai satu kesatuan tunggal. Seharusnya 'is'.

written_expression.questionText: No s̲o̲o̲n̲e̲r̲ had he a̲r̲r̲i̲v̲e̲d̲ t̲h̲a̲n̲ it b̲e̲g̲a̲n̲ r̲a̲i̲n̲i̲n̲g̲.
written_expression.explanation: Setelah 'began', biasanya digunakan 'to rain' atau 'raining'. Kalimat ini benar. Jika harus ada salah, cek apakah 'to rain' lebih formal. Namun 'began raining' secara umum benar. Jika di opsi ada 'arrived' diganti 'arrive', itu salah.

written_expression.questionText: H̲a̲d̲ I known, I w̲o̲u̲l̲d̲ h̲e̲l̲p̲ you y̲e̲s̲t̲e̲rday̲.
written_expression.explanation: Conditional Type 3. Seharusnya 'would have helped'.

written_expression.questionText: The committee a̲r̲e̲ unable t̲o̲ a̲g̲r̲e̲e̲ o̲n̲ a final decision.
written_expression.explanation: Collective nouns (committee) biasanya dianggap tunggal kecuali anggota-anggotanya bertindak sendiri-sendiri. Di TOEFL, 'is' lebih diharapkan.

written_expression.questionText: Every day, she i̲s̲ g̲o̲i̲n̲g̲ t̲o̲ the gym t̲o̲ e̲x̲e̲r̲c̲i̲s̲e̲.
written_expression.explanation: Untuk kebiasaan rutin (Every day), gunakan Simple Present. Seharusnya 'goes'.

written_expression.questionText: The flowers s̲m̲e̲l̲l̲ s̲w̲e̲e̲t̲l̲y̲ i̲n̲ the garden a̲f̲t̲e̲r̲ the rain.
written_expression.explanation: Linking verb 'smell' diikuti kata sifat. Seharusnya 'sweet'.

written_expression.questionText: N̲e̲v̲e̲r̲ I have s̲e̲e̲n̲ such a b̲e̲a̲u̲t̲i̲f̲u̲l̲ s̲u̲n̲s̲e̲t̲.
written_expression.explanation: Negative inversion (Never). Seharusnya 'have I seen'.

written_expression.questionText: She is t̲o̲o̲ young t̲o̲ n̲o̲t̲ understand the g̲r̲a̲v̲i̲t̲y̲ of the s̲i̲t̲u̲a̲t̲i̲o̲n̲.
written_expression.explanation: Struktur 'too... to' biasanya tidak disisipkan 'not' di tengah infinitive. Seharusnya 'too young to understand'.

written_expression.questionText: The criteria for the s̲e̲l̲e̲c̲t̲i̲o̲n̲ process w̲a̲s̲ extremely s̲t̲r̲i̲c̲t̲.
written_expression.explanation: 'Criteria' adalah bentuk jamak dari 'criterion'. Seharusnya 'were'.

written_expression.questionText: He w̲o̲r̲k̲s̲ h̲a̲r̲d̲l̲y̲ t̲o̲ support his family, but i̲t̲ is not enough.
written_expression.explanation: 'Hardly' berarti 'hampir tidak'. Untuk menyatakan bekerja dengan keras, gunakan 'hard'. Seharusnya 'works hard'.

written_expression.questionText: The m̲a̲j̲o̲r̲i̲t̲y̲ of the students p̲r̲e̲f̲e̲r̲s̲ online l̲e̲a̲r̲n̲i̲n̲g̲ t̲o̲ traditional classes.
written_expression.explanation: Ketika 'majority' merujuk pada sekelompok orang yang dapat dihitung (students), kata kerjanya jamak. Seharusnya 'prefer'.

written_expression.questionText: The luggage w̲e̲r̲e̲ checked i̲n̲ a̲t̲ the airport c̲o̲u̲n̲t̲e̲r̲.
written_expression.explanation: 'Luggage' adalah uncountable noun. Seharusnya 'was'.

written_expression.questionText: Not until s̲h̲e̲ spoke d̲i̲d̲ I r̲e̲a̲l̲i̲z̲e̲d̲ who s̲h̲e̲ was.
written_expression.explanation: Setelah auxiliary 'did', kata kerja harus kembali ke bentuk dasar. Seharusnya 'realize'.

written_expression.questionText: I'd s̲o̲o̲n̲e̲r̲ you d̲i̲d̲n̲'̲t̲ s̲m̲o̲k̲e̲ i̲n̲ here.
written_expression.explanation: Kalimat ini benar secara idiomatis. 'I'd sooner' mirip dengan 'I'd rather'. Jika soal mencari kesalahan, periksa opsi lain. Jika tidak ada, kalimat ini benar.

written_expression.questionText: He is e̲n̲o̲u̲g̲h̲ old t̲o̲ make his o̲w̲n̲ d̲e̲c̲i̲s̲i̲o̲n̲s̲.
written_expression.explanation: Adverbia 'enough' diletakkan setelah kata sifat (adjective). Seharusnya 'old enough'.

written_expression.questionText: The n̲u̲m̲b̲e̲r̲ of people w̲h̲o̲ attend the festival i̲s̲ g̲r̲o̲w̲i̲n̲g̲.
written_expression.explanation: 'who' merujuk pada 'people' (jamak), sehingga kata kerja di dalam klausa relatif harus 'attend'. Namun subjek utama adalah 'The number' (tunggal), maka 'is' sudah benar. Kesalahan ada pada 'attend' yang seharusnya 'attends' jika merujuk ke 'number', tapi 'who' merujuk ke people, jadi 'attend' benar. Cek teliti: Kalimat ini benar.

written_expression.questionText: The news w̲h̲i̲c̲h̲ I heard y̲e̲s̲t̲e̲rday̲ w̲e̲r̲e̲ quite s̲u̲r̲p̲r̲i̲s̲i̲n̲g̲.
written_expression.explanation: 'News' adalah singular. Seharusnya 'was'.

written_expression.questionText: The teacher, as well as the students, w̲e̲r̲e̲ shocked b̲y̲ the n̲e̲w̲s̲.
written_expression.explanation: Subjek utama 'The teacher' adalah tunggal. Seharusnya 'was'.

written_expression.questionText: S̲h̲o̲u̲l̲d̲ the storm w̲e̲r̲e̲ to intensify, the r̲e̲s̲i̲d̲e̲n̲t̲s̲ w̲o̲u̲l̲d̲ b̲e̲ evacuated immediately.
written_expression.explanation: Struktur Inverted Conditional tipe 1/future menggunakan 'Should + Subject + Verb 1'. Seharusnya 'Should the storm intensify' tanpa kata 'were'.

written_expression.questionText: T̲h̲e̲ a̲n̲a̲l̲y̲s̲i̲s̲ of the s̲a̲m̲p̲l̲e̲s̲ r̲e̲v̲e̲a̲l̲ that the water contains h̲i̲g̲h̲ l̲e̲v̲e̲l̲s̲ of mercury.
written_expression.explanation: Subjek utama adalah 'The analysis' (tunggal), maka kata kerja harus menggunakan akhiran -s. Seharusnya 'reveals'.

written_expression.questionText: O̲n̲l̲y̲ a̲f̲t̲e̲r̲ the vote had been counted t̲h̲e̲ winner w̲a̲s̲ announced.
written_expression.explanation: Kalimat yang dimulai dengan 'Only after' memerlukan inversi pada klausa utama. Seharusnya 'was the winner announced'.

written_expression.questionText: The m̲o̲r̲e̲ complex the m̲a̲t̲h̲e̲m̲a̲t̲i̲c̲a̲l̲ problem, the m̲o̲r̲e̲ t̲i̲m̲e̲ d̲o̲ it takes to solve.
written_expression.explanation: Dalam struktur 'The more... the more...', tidak digunakan kata bantu 'do' untuk kalimat pernyataan. Seharusnya 'the more time it takes'.

written_expression.questionText: I̲t̲ is r̲e̲c̲o̲m̲m̲e̲n̲d̲e̲d̲ that every participant i̲s̲ present f̲o̲r̲ the briefing.
written_expression.explanation: Subjunctive mood setelah 'recommended'. Kata kerja 'be' harus dalam bentuk dasar. Seharusnya 'be', bukan 'is'.

written_expression.questionText: N̲o̲t̲ o̲n̲l̲y̲ the results are i̲n̲c̲o̲n̲c̲l̲u̲s̲i̲v̲e̲, but they a̲l̲s̲o̲ contradict p̲r̲e̲v̲i̲o̲u̲s̲ findings.
written_expression.explanation: Negative inversion di awal kalimat. Seharusnya 'Not only are the results'.

written_expression.questionText: Neither the f̲e̲d̲e̲r̲a̲l̲ government n̲o̲r̲ the states h̲a̲s̲ the authority t̲o̲ override the constitution.
written_expression.explanation: Dalam 'Neither... nor', kata kerja mengikuti subjek terdekat ('the states' - jamak). Seharusnya 'have'.

written_expression.questionText: The d̲e̲s̲i̲g̲n̲ of the new engine i̲s̲ s̲i̲m̲i̲l̲a̲r̲ t̲o̲ the old o̲n̲e̲.
written_expression.explanation: Faulty comparison. Seharusnya membandingkan desain dengan desain, bukan desain dengan mesin. Seharusnya 'similar to that of the old one'.

written_expression.questionText: U̲n̲d̲e̲r̲ no circumstances t̲h̲e̲ vault s̲h̲o̲u̲l̲d̲ be opened w̲i̲t̲h̲o̲u̲t̲ authorization.
written_expression.explanation: Inversi diperlukan setelah frasa negatif 'Under no circumstances'. Seharusnya 'should the vault be'.

written_expression.questionText: The s̲t̲r̲a̲t̲e̲g̲y̲ i̲n̲v̲o̲l̲v̲e̲s̲ hiring new staff, i̲n̲c̲r̲e̲a̲s̲i̲n̲g̲ the budget, and t̲o̲ improve marketing.
written_expression.explanation: Parallel structure. Karena sebelumnya menggunakan gerund (hiring, increasing), maka bagian terakhir harus gerund juga. Seharusnya 'improving'.

written_expression.questionText: H̲a̲d̲ we b̲e̲e̲n̲ aware of the risks, we w̲o̲u̲l̲d̲ n̲o̲t̲ proceed with the investment.
written_expression.explanation: Conditional Type 3 (past unreal). Pasangan 'Had + V3' adalah 'would have + V3'. Seharusnya 'would not have proceeded'.

written_expression.questionText: The p̲h̲e̲n̲o̲m̲e̲n̲o̲n̲ of light r̲e̲f̲r̲a̲c̲t̲i̲o̲n̲ e̲x̲p̲l̲a̲i̲n̲ why a straw l̲o̲o̲k̲s̲ broken in water.
written_expression.explanation: Subjek 'The phenomenon' adalah tunggal. Kata kerja seharusnya 'explains'.

written_expression.questionText: B̲y̲ the time the rescue team f̲o̲u̲n̲d̲ them, they w̲e̲r̲e̲ s̲u̲r̲v̲i̲v̲i̲n̲g̲ on rainwater for three days.
written_expression.explanation: Menunjukkan durasi sebelum waktu lampau tertentu. Gunakan Past Perfect Continuous. Seharusnya 'had been surviving'.

written_expression.questionText: The news of the m̲e̲r̲g̲e̲r̲ w̲e̲r̲e̲ m̲e̲t̲ with mixed r̲e̲a̲c̲t̲i̲o̲n̲s̲ by the employees.
written_expression.explanation: 'News' adalah kata benda tunggal (uncountable). Seharusnya 'was met'.

written_expression.questionText: The c̲o̲u̲n̲c̲i̲l̲ members, n̲o̲t̲ the mayor, i̲s̲ responsible f̲o̲r̲ passing the budget.
written_expression.explanation: Subjek utama adalah 'The council members' (jamak). Frasa negatif 'not the mayor' tidak merubah subjek utama. Seharusnya 'are'.

written_expression.questionText: I̲t̲ was s̲u̲c̲h̲ a heavy rain t̲h̲a̲t̲ the game was c̲a̲l̲l̲e̲d̲ off.
written_expression.explanation: 'Rain' dalam konteks ini biasanya uncountable. 'Such a' digunakan untuk countable singular noun. Seharusnya 'such heavy rain'.

written_expression.questionText: Seldom w̲e̲ have e̲n̲c̲o̲u̲n̲t̲e̲r̲e̲d̲ such a f̲o̲r̲m̲i̲d̲a̲b̲l̲e̲ o̲p̲p̲o̲n̲e̲n̲t̲.
written_expression.explanation: Negative inversion dengan 'Seldom'. Seharusnya 'have we encountered'.

written_expression.questionText: The physics p̲r̲o̲f̲e̲s̲s̲o̲r̲, t̲o̲g̲e̲t̲h̲e̲r̲ w̲i̲t̲h̲ his students, h̲a̲v̲e̲ d̲e̲v̲e̲l̲o̲p̲e̲d̲ a new formula.
written_expression.explanation: Frasa 'together with' tidak membuat subjek menjadi jamak. 'Professor' tunggal, maka 'has developed'.

written_expression.questionText: L̲i̲t̲t̲l̲e̲ he knew t̲h̲a̲t̲ the s̲e̲c̲r̲e̲t̲ had been d̲i̲s̲c̲o̲v̲e̲r̲e̲d̲ weeks ago.
written_expression.explanation: Negative inversion dengan 'Little'. Seharusnya 'Little did he know'.

written_expression.questionText: The d̲a̲t̲a̲ c̲o̲l̲l̲e̲c̲t̲e̲d̲ by the r̲e̲s̲e̲a̲r̲c̲h̲e̲r̲ is i̲n̲s̲u̲f̲f̲i̲c̲i̲e̲n̲t̲ to draw a conclusion.
written_expression.explanation: Dalam konteks akademik TOEFL formal, 'data' dianggap jamak (plural). Seharusnya 'are'.

written_expression.questionText: B̲e̲i̲n̲g̲ that he is a junior, he i̲s̲ n̲o̲t̲ eligible t̲o̲ lead the c̲o̲m̲m̲i̲t̲t̲e̲e̲.
written_expression.explanation: 'Being that' dianggap tidak baku dalam bahasa Inggris formal/TOEFL. Gunakan 'Since' atau 'Because'.

written_expression.questionText: The e̲c̲o̲n̲o̲m̲i̲s̲t̲ argued that the m̲a̲r̲k̲e̲t̲ f̲l̲u̲c̲t̲u̲a̲t̲e̲s̲ i̲n̲v̲o̲l̲u̲n̲t̲a̲r̲i̲l̲y̲.
written_expression.explanation: Kalimat ini benar secara gramatikal. Namun jika konteksnya adalah teori umum di masa lampau, past tense 'fluctuated' mungkin dicari, tapi secara umum kalimat ini benar. (Hati-hati jebakan).

written_expression.questionText: No s̲o̲o̲n̲e̲r̲ we had entered the building t̲h̲a̲n̲ the lights w̲e̲n̲t̲ o̲u̲t̲.
written_expression.explanation: Inversi wajib setelah 'No sooner'. Seharusnya 'had we entered'.

written_expression.questionText: The r̲e̲s̲e̲a̲r̲c̲h̲e̲r̲ a̲s̲k̲e̲d̲ that the experiment s̲h̲o̲u̲l̲d̲ b̲e̲ repeated for v̲e̲r̲i̲f̲i̲c̲a̲t̲i̲o̲n̲.
written_expression.explanation: Subjunctive mood setelah 'asked' (permintaan). Seharusnya menggunakan bare infinitive 'be repeated' tanpa 'should'.

written_expression.questionText: The c̲o̲m̲p̲u̲t̲e̲r̲ software, i̲n̲s̲t̲a̲l̲l̲i̲n̲g̲ yesterday, i̲s̲ causing the system t̲o̲ crash.
written_expression.explanation: Reduced relative clause bermakna pasif. Software diinstal, bukan menginstal sendiri. Seharusnya 'installed'.

written_expression.questionText: She is o̲n̲e̲ of those people who w̲o̲r̲k̲s̲ b̲e̲s̲t̲ u̲n̲d̲e̲r̲ pressure.
written_expression.explanation: 'who' merujuk pada 'people' (jamak). Maka kata kerja seharusnya 'work'.

written_expression.questionText: H̲a̲v̲i̲n̲g̲ been s̲e̲l̲e̲c̲t̲e̲d̲ for the award, the trophy w̲a̲s̲ p̲r̲e̲s̲e̲n̲t̲e̲d̲ to the actor.
written_expression.explanation: Dangling modifier. Klausa 'Having been selected' merujuk ke 'the actor', bukan 'the trophy'. Seharusnya 'the actor was presented with the trophy'.

written_expression.questionText: The reason why he r̲e̲s̲i̲g̲n̲e̲d̲ was b̲e̲c̲a̲u̲s̲e̲ his health w̲a̲s̲ d̲e̲t̲e̲r̲i̲o̲r̲a̲t̲i̲n̲g̲.
written_expression.explanation: Redundansi (The reason... is because). Seharusnya 'that'.

written_expression.questionText: N̲o̲t̲ only w̲a̲s̲ he a gifted musician, b̲u̲t̲ h̲e̲ also a talented painter.
written_expression.explanation: Parallelism. Klausa kedua kehilangan kata kerja. Seharusnya 'but he was also' atau 'but also a talented painter'.

written_expression.questionText: I̲f̲ I w̲o̲u̲l̲d̲ h̲a̲v̲e̲ known about the meeting, I w̲o̲u̲l̲d̲ have a̲t̲t̲e̲n̲d̲e̲d̲.
written_expression.explanation: Dalam klausa 'if' pada Conditional Type 3, tidak boleh menggunakan 'would have'. Seharusnya 'If I had known'.

written_expression.questionText: The criteria for evaluating the e̲n̲t̲r̲i̲e̲s̲ h̲a̲v̲e̲ changed s̲i̲n̲c̲e̲ l̲a̲s̲t̲ year.
written_expression.explanation: Kalimat ini benar. 'Criteria' jamak, 'have' jamak. Jika di opsi ada 'has', itu salah.

written_expression.questionText: It is e̲s̲s̲e̲n̲t̲i̲a̲l̲ that the m̲e̲d̲i̲c̲i̲n̲e̲ i̲s̲ administered i̲m̲m̲e̲d̲i̲a̲t̲e̲l̲y̲.
written_expression.explanation: Subjunctive mood. Seharusnya 'be administered'.

written_expression.questionText: Scarcely h̲a̲d̲ the s̲p̲e̲a̲k̲e̲r̲ finished t̲h̲a̲n̲ the audience b̲u̲r̲s̲t̲ into applause.
written_expression.explanation: Pasangan 'Scarcely' adalah 'when', bukan 'than'.

written_expression.questionText: He is s̲o̲ intelligent a boy t̲h̲a̲t̲ he u̲n̲d̲e̲r̲s̲t̲a̲n̲d̲s̲ e̲v̲e̲r̲y̲t̲h̲i̲n̲g̲.
written_expression.explanation: Kalimat ini benar secara struktur formal 'so + adjective + a + noun'. Namun jika 'so' diganti 'such', baru salah.

written_expression.questionText: E̲i̲t̲h̲e̲r̲ of the two o̲p̲t̲i̲o̲n̲s̲ a̲r̲e̲ acceptable t̲o̲ the board.
written_expression.explanation: 'Either' sebagai subjek tunggal membutuhkan kata kerja tunggal. Seharusnya 'is'.

written_expression.questionText: Supposing h̲e̲ d̲o̲e̲s̲ not a̲r̲r̲i̲v̲e̲, what s̲h̲a̲l̲l̲ we do?
written_expression.explanation: Secara gramatikal benar, tapi 'shall' jarang digunakan dalam TOEFL modern kecuali sangat formal. Namun jika 'does' diganti 'did', 'shall' harus jadi 'should'.

written_expression.questionText: The novel is m̲o̲r̲e̲ exciting t̲h̲a̲n̲ t̲h̲a̲t̲ movie w̲h̲i̲c̲h̲ we saw.
written_expression.explanation: Perbandingan harus setara. Seharusnya 'the movie' bukan 'that movie' jika merujuk pada objek spesifik yang sudah dilihat bersama. Namun kesalahan yang lebih fatal biasanya di struktur lain.

written_expression.questionText: N̲o̲t̲ o̲n̲l̲y̲ she failed the exam, but s̲h̲e̲ a̲l̲s̲o̲ lost h̲e̲r̲ scholarship.
written_expression.explanation: Inversi diperlukan: 'Not only did she fail'.

written_expression.questionText: The m̲a̲j̲o̲r̲i̲t̲y̲ of the i̲n̲f̲o̲r̲m̲a̲t̲i̲o̲n̲ w̲e̲r̲e̲ misleading.
written_expression.explanation: 'Information' adalah uncountable. Meskipun ada kata 'majority', kata kerja tetap mengikuti noun uncountable-nya. Seharusnya 'was'.

written_expression.questionText: B̲y̲ next month, I w̲i̲l̲l̲ b̲e̲ l̲i̲v̲i̲n̲g̲ in this city f̲o̲r̲ five years.
written_expression.explanation: Menunjukkan durasi di masa depan. Gunakan Future Perfect Continuous. Seharusnya 'will have been living'.

written_expression.questionText: The p̲r̲o̲f̲e̲s̲s̲o̲r̲ i̲n̲s̲i̲s̲t̲e̲d̲ that we r̲e̲w̲r̲i̲t̲e̲s̲ the e̲n̲t̲i̲r̲e̲ chapter.
written_expression.explanation: Subjunctive mood. Seharusnya 'rewrite'.

written_expression.questionText: N̲e̲i̲t̲h̲e̲r̲ of the a̲l̲t̲e̲r̲n̲a̲t̲i̲v̲e̲s̲ s̲e̲e̲m̲ v̲i̲a̲b̲l̲e̲ to us.
written_expression.explanation: 'Neither' (subjek) adalah tunggal. Seharusnya 'seems'.

written_expression.questionText: The g̲o̲v̲e̲r̲n̲m̲e̲n̲t̲ r̲e̲q̲u̲i̲r̲e̲s̲ that every citizen f̲i̲l̲e̲s̲ t̲h̲e̲i̲r̲ taxes by April.
written_expression.explanation: Subjunctive mood setelah 'requires'. Seharusnya 'file'.

written_expression.questionText: The p̲r̲o̲l̲i̲f̲e̲r̲a̲t̲i̲o̲n̲ of unauthorized streaming s̲e̲r̲v̲i̲c̲e̲s̲ h̲a̲v̲e̲ severely impacted the r̲e̲v̲e̲n̲u̲e̲ of the film industry.
written_expression.explanation: Subjek utama adalah 'proliferation' (tunggal). Frasa preposisi 'of unauthorized streaming services' tidak mengubah jumlah subjek. Seharusnya menggunakan 'has'.

written_expression.questionText: The new p̲o̲l̲i̲c̲y̲ aims to i̲n̲c̲r̲e̲a̲s̲e̲ productivity, r̲e̲d̲u̲c̲i̲n̲g̲ overhead costs, and improve employee m̲o̲r̲a̲l̲e̲.
written_expression.explanation: Prinsip paralelisme (kesetaraan). Karena dihubungkan dengan 'increase' dan 'improve', maka kata kerja ini harus setara. Seharusnya 'reduce'.

written_expression.questionText: Under no c̲i̲r̲c̲u̲m̲s̲t̲a̲n̲c̲e̲s̲ t̲h̲e̲ a̲u̲d̲i̲t̲o̲r̲s̲ w̲i̲l̲l̲ a̲c̲c̲e̲p̲t̲ i̲n̲c̲o̲m̲p̲l̲e̲t̲e̲ financial records.
written_expression.explanation: Negative inversion. Jika kalimat diawali dengan frasa negatif seperti 'Under no circumstances', subjek dan kata kerja bantu harus dibalik. Seharusnya 'will the auditors'.

written_expression.questionText: It is c̲r̲u̲c̲i̲a̲l̲ that the f̲a̲c̲i̲l̲i̲t̲y̲ m̲a̲n̲a̲g̲e̲r̲ r̲e̲p̲o̲r̲t̲s̲ any safety violations i̲m̲m̲e̲d̲i̲a̲t̲e̲l̲y̲.
written_expression.explanation: Subjunctive mood. Setelah frasa 'It is crucial that', kata kerja harus dalam bentuk dasar (bare infinitive). Seharusnya 'report', bukan 'reports'.

written_expression.questionText: E̲x̲h̲a̲u̲s̲t̲e̲d̲ from the marathon, t̲h̲e̲ r̲e̲s̲t̲a̲u̲r̲a̲n̲t̲ was the f̲i̲r̲s̲t̲ stop for the a̲t̲h̲l̲e̲t̲e̲s̲.
written_expression.explanation: Dangling modifier. Subjek yang kelelahan (exhausted) seharusnya para atlet, bukan restoran. Seharusnya subjek setelah koma adalah 'the athletes'.

written_expression.questionText: The a̲r̲c̲h̲i̲t̲e̲c̲t̲u̲r̲e̲ of the new museum is surprisingly s̲i̲m̲i̲l̲a̲r̲ to the o̲l̲d̲ l̲i̲b̲r̲a̲r̲y̲ in the city c̲e̲n̲t̲e̲r̲.
written_expression.explanation: Faulty comparison (perbandingan yang tidak logis). Arsitektur museum tidak bisa dibandingkan dengan perpustakaan, melainkan dengan arsitektur perpustakaan. Seharusnya 'that of the old library'.

written_expression.questionText: The r̲e̲s̲e̲a̲r̲c̲h̲e̲r̲s̲ gathered m̲a̲n̲y̲ v̲a̲l̲u̲a̲b̲l̲e̲ e̲q̲u̲i̲p̲m̲e̲n̲t̲s̲ for the upcoming e̲x̲p̲e̲d̲i̲t̲i̲o̲n̲.
written_expression.explanation: 'Equipment' adalah uncountable noun (kata benda yang tidak dapat dihitung), sehingga tidak boleh memiliki akhiran -s. Seharusnya 'equipment'.

written_expression.questionText: The d̲e̲s̲e̲r̲t̲ experiences s̲o̲ extreme t̲e̲m̲p̲e̲r̲a̲t̲u̲r̲e̲s̲ that very f̲e̲w̲ species can s̲u̲r̲v̲i̲v̲e̲.
written_expression.explanation: Kata 'so' digunakan sebelum kata sifat (adjective) tanpa kata benda. Karena ada kata benda 'temperatures', seharusnya menggunakan 'such'.

written_expression.questionText: Every e̲m̲p̲l̲o̲y̲e̲e̲ is e̲x̲p̲e̲c̲t̲e̲d̲ to submit t̲h̲e̲i̲r̲ performance r̲e̲v̲i̲e̲w̲ by Friday.
written_expression.explanation: Dalam aturan grammar formal TOEFL, subjek 'Every employee' bersifat tunggal. Kata ganti kepemilikannya seharusnya 'his or her', bukan 'their'.

written_expression.questionText: The c̲o̲n̲s̲e̲n̲s̲u̲s̲ o̲f̲ o̲p̲i̲n̲i̲o̲n̲ among the s̲c̲i̲e̲n̲t̲i̲s̲t̲s̲ was that the experiment n̲e̲e̲d̲e̲d̲ more funding.
written_expression.explanation: Redundancy (pemborosan kata). 'Consensus' sudah bermakna kesepakatan pendapat (agreement of opinion), sehingga penambahan 'of opinion' berlebihan. Seharusnya dihilangkan.

written_expression.questionText: The committee c̲o̲u̲l̲d̲ h̲a̲r̲d̲l̲y̲ n̲o̲t̲ agree on a s̲i̲n̲g̲l̲e̲ proposal d̲u̲r̲i̲n̲g̲ the meeting.
written_expression.explanation: Double negative. Kata 'hardly' sudah memiliki makna negatif, sehingga tidak boleh diikuti oleh kata 'not'.

written_expression.questionText: The choir sang s̲o̲ b̲e̲a̲u̲t̲i̲f̲u̲l̲ that the e̲n̲t̲i̲r̲e̲ audience was moved to t̲e̲a̲r̲s̲.
written_expression.explanation: Kata yang menjelaskan kata kerja 'sang' (bernyanyi) haruslah sebuah kata keterangan (adverb). Seharusnya 'beautifully'.

written_expression.questionText: The detective a̲s̲k̲e̲d̲ the suspect w̲h̲e̲r̲e̲ d̲i̲d̲ h̲e̲ h̲i̲d̲e̲ the stolen j̲e̲w̲e̲l̲r̲y̲.
written_expression.explanation: Embedded question (noun clause). Pertanyaan yang disematkan dalam kalimat pernyataan tidak memerlukan inversi (kata bantu diletakkan sebelum subjek). Seharusnya 'where he hid'.

written_expression.questionText: She r̲e̲f̲u̲s̲e̲d̲ a̲c̲c̲e̲p̲t̲i̲n̲g̲ the a̲w̲a̲r̲d̲ because she felt she d̲i̲d̲ n̲o̲t̲ deserve it.
written_expression.explanation: Kata kerja 'refused' harus selalu diikuti oleh infinitive (to + verb), bukan gerund (verb-ing). Seharusnya 'to accept'.

written_expression.questionText: The manager was s̲h̲o̲c̲k̲e̲d̲ a̲b̲o̲u̲t̲ the n̲u̲m̲b̲e̲r̲ of complaints received t̲h̲i̲s̲ week.
written_expression.explanation: Preposisi idiomatis. Kata sifat 'shocked' biasanya dipasangkan dengan preposisi 'at' atau 'by', bukan 'about'.

written_expression.questionText: The j̲u̲d̲g̲e̲ mandated that the d̲e̲f̲e̲n̲d̲a̲n̲t̲ m̲a̲k̲e̲s̲ full restitution t̲o̲ the victims.
written_expression.explanation: Subjunctive mood. Setelah kata kerja seperti 'mandated', kata kerja pada klausa 'that' harus bentuk dasar. Seharusnya 'make'.

written_expression.questionText: The f̲a̲s̲c̲i̲n̲a̲t̲i̲n̲g̲ students l̲i̲s̲t̲e̲n̲e̲d̲ closely a̲s̲ the guest speaker explained the c̲o̲m̲p̲l̲e̲x̲ theory.
written_expression.explanation: Participle adjective. Untuk menyatakan perasaan seseorang, gunakan past participle (-ed). 'Fascinating' berarti 'menarik', sedangkan seharusnya 'Fascinated' (tertarik/terpesona).

written_expression.questionText: The n̲u̲m̲b̲e̲r̲ of available j̲o̲b̲s̲ i̲n̲ the tech industry a̲r̲e̲ declining.
written_expression.explanation: Frasa 'The number of' selalu dihitung sebagai subjek tunggal. Seharusnya menggunakan 'is'.

written_expression.questionText: N̲o̲t̲ o̲n̲l̲y̲ did he write the script, b̲u̲t̲ h̲e̲ a̲l̲s̲o̲ d̲i̲r̲e̲c̲t̲i̲n̲g̲ the m̲o̲v̲i̲e̲.
written_expression.explanation: Paralelisme tense. Bagian pertama menggunakan past tense 'did he write', maka bagian kedua harus setara. Seharusnya 'directed'.

written_expression.questionText: The h̲u̲m̲a̲n̲ b̲r̲a̲i̲n̲ is a̲ m̲o̲s̲t̲ complex organ i̲n̲ the e̲n̲t̲i̲r̲e̲ body.
written_expression.explanation: Superlative degree (tingkatan paling). Untuk kata sifat dalam bentuk superlatif (most complex), artikel yang digunakan harus 'the', bukan 'a'.

written_expression.questionText: The new s̲o̲f̲t̲w̲a̲r̲e̲ is designed to h̲e̲l̲p̲ a̲u̲t̲h̲o̲r̲s̲ organize i̲t̲s̲ manuscripts more e̲f̲f̲i̲c̲i̲e̲n̲t̲l̲y̲.
written_expression.explanation: Pronoun agreement (kesesuaian kata ganti). Kata ganti 'its' merujuk pada 'authors' yang mana adalah jamak. Seharusnya 'their'.

written_expression.questionText: I̲f̲ the company w̲a̲s̲ more innovative, i̲t̲ would dominate the g̲l̲o̲b̲a̲l̲ market.
written_expression.explanation: Conditional Type 2 (unreal present). Untuk semua subjek dalam pengandaian yang tidak nyata, to be yang digunakan adalah 'were'. Seharusnya 'If the company were'.

written_expression.questionText: B̲e̲c̲a̲u̲s̲e̲ o̲f̲ the flight was delayed, the c̲o̲n̲f̲e̲r̲e̲n̲c̲e̲ attendees m̲i̲s̲s̲e̲d̲ the keynote speech.
written_expression.explanation: 'Because of' harus diikuti oleh frasa kata benda (noun phrase). Karena setelahnya terdapat klausa lengkap 'the flight was delayed', seharusnya cukup menggunakan konjungsi 'Because'.

written_expression.questionText: The p̲o̲l̲i̲t̲i̲c̲i̲a̲n̲ delivered an e̲x̲t̲r̲e̲m̲e̲ powerful s̲p̲e̲e̲c̲h̲ that resonated w̲i̲t̲h̲ the voters.
written_expression.explanation: Kata yang menjelaskan kata sifat 'powerful' harus berupa kata keterangan (adverb). Seharusnya 'extremely'.

written_expression.questionText: The s̲c̲i̲e̲n̲t̲i̲s̲t̲ w̲h̲i̲c̲h̲ discovered the cure w̲a̲s̲ awarded the Nobel P̲r̲i̲z̲e̲.
written_expression.explanation: Relative pronoun untuk merujuk pada manusia (the scientist) adalah 'who' atau 'that', bukan 'which'.

written_expression.questionText: She enjoys s̲w̲i̲m̲m̲i̲n̲g̲, t̲o̲ r̲e̲a̲d̲ novels, and h̲i̲k̲i̲n̲g̲ in the m̲o̲u̲n̲t̲a̲i̲n̲s̲.
written_expression.explanation: Faulty parallelism (paralelisme yang salah). Karena anggota daftar lainnya menggunakan gerund (swimming, hiking), kata ini juga harus menggunakan gerund. Seharusnya 'reading'.

written_expression.questionText: The t̲o̲u̲r̲i̲s̲t̲s̲ carried t̲o̲o̲ m̲a̲n̲y̲ l̲u̲g̲g̲a̲g̲e̲s̲ for the s̲m̲a̲l̲l̲ trunk of the taxi.
written_expression.explanation: 'Luggage' adalah uncountable noun (kata benda yang tidak bisa dihitung) sehingga tidak memiliki bentuk jamak. Seharusnya 'luggage' (dan 'many' seharusnya 'much').

written_expression.questionText: Mount Everest, the highest m̲o̲u̲n̲t̲a̲i̲n̲ i̲n̲ the world, i̲s̲ located a̲t̲ the Himalayas.
written_expression.explanation: Preposisi lokasi. Untuk menyebutkan wilayah atau pegunungan (Himalayas), preposisi yang benar adalah 'in', bukan 'at'.

written_expression.questionText: O̲n̲l̲y̲ b̲y̲ working together t̲h̲e̲ t̲e̲a̲m̲ m̲e̲m̲b̲e̲r̲s̲ c̲a̲n̲ complete the p̲r̲o̲j̲e̲c̲t̲.
written_expression.explanation: Inversi wajib (mandatory inversion). Kalimat yang diawali dengan frasa 'Only + preposisi' harus diikuti dengan inversi subjek dan kata kerja bantu. Seharusnya 'can the team members'.

written_expression.questionText: B̲y̲ the time the police a̲r̲r̲i̲v̲e̲d̲, the thieves a̲l̲r̲e̲a̲d̲y̲ l̲e̲f̲t̲ the bank.
written_expression.explanation: Sequence of tenses. Kejadian yang selesai sebelum kejadian lampau lainnya (arrived) harus menggunakan Past Perfect Tense. Seharusnya 'had already left'.

written_expression.questionText: The c̲o̲m̲m̲i̲t̲t̲e̲e̲ has decided to p̲o̲s̲t̲p̲o̲n̲e̲ the meeting i̲n̲d̲e̲f̲i̲n̲i̲t̲e̲l̲y̲ b̲e̲c̲a̲u̲s̲e̲ l̲a̲c̲k̲ of quorum.
written_expression.explanation: 'Because' adalah konjungsi dan harus diikuti klausa. Karena 'lack of quorum' adalah frasa kata benda, seharusnya menggunakan preposisi 'because of'.

written_expression.questionText: This year's p̲r̲o̲f̲i̲t̲s̲ are m̲u̲c̲h̲ m̲o̲r̲e̲ h̲i̲g̲h̲e̲r̲ t̲h̲a̲n̲ those of the p̲r̲e̲v̲i̲o̲u̲s̲ year.
written_expression.explanation: Double comparative. Kata 'higher' sudah berarti 'lebih tinggi', sehingga penambahan 'more' menjadikannya redundan. Seharusnya cukup 'much higher'.

written_expression.questionText: The general c̲o̲m̲m̲a̲n̲d̲e̲d̲ his troops to retreat l̲e̲s̲t̲ they a̲r̲e̲ captured b̲y̲ the enemy.
written_expression.explanation: Setelah konjungsi 'lest' (agar tidak), klausa selanjutnya harus menggunakan subjunctive mood (bentuk dasar) atau modal 'should'. Seharusnya 'be' atau 'should be'.

written_expression.questionText: The a̲m̲u̲s̲e̲d̲ park was f̲i̲l̲l̲e̲d̲ w̲i̲t̲h̲ screaming c̲h̲i̲l̲d̲r̲e̲n̲.
written_expression.explanation: Kesalahan pilihan kata (word choice). Kata yang tepat untuk taman hiburan adalah 'amusement' park, bukan 'amused' park.

written_expression.questionText: A p̲a̲c̲k̲ of wolves w̲e̲r̲e̲ seen h̲o̲w̲l̲i̲n̲g̲ at the m̲o̲o̲n̲ last night.
written_expression.explanation: Subjek kalimat adalah 'A pack' (tunggal), sedangkan 'of wolves' hanyalah frasa preposisi. Kata kerja seharusnya menyesuaikan menjadi 'was'.

written_expression.questionText: She has b̲e̲e̲n̲ working i̲n̲ this corporation s̲i̲n̲c̲e̲ t̲h̲r̲e̲e̲ y̲e̲a̲r̲s̲.
written_expression.explanation: 'Since' digunakan untuk titik waktu tertentu (since 2020), sedangkan untuk durasi waktu (three years) harus menggunakan 'for'.

written_expression.questionText: Exhausted from the t̲r̲i̲p̲, she d̲e̲c̲i̲d̲e̲d̲ to l̲a̲y̲ down on the s̲o̲f̲a̲.
written_expression.explanation: Kesalahan penggunaan antara kata kerja transitif dan intransitif. Untuk bermakna 'berbaring', kata kerja yang benar adalah 'lie', bukan 'lay' (meletakkan).

written_expression.questionText: I am n̲o̲t̲ u̲s̲e̲d̲ t̲o̲ d̲r̲i̲v̲e̲ on the l̲e̲f̲t̲ side of the r̲o̲a̲d̲.
written_expression.explanation: Frasa 'be used to' (terbiasa dengan) harus diikuti oleh noun atau gerund (verb-ing). Seharusnya 'driving'.

written_expression.questionText: H̲a̲r̲d̲l̲y̲ s̲h̲e̲ h̲a̲d̲ entered the room w̲h̲e̲n̲ the phone b̲e̲g̲a̲n̲ to ring.
written_expression.explanation: Negative inversion. Jika diawali dengan adverbia negatif 'Hardly', posisi subjek dan auxiliary harus dibalik. Seharusnya 'had she'.

written_expression.questionText: They p̲l̲a̲n̲ to r̲e̲t̲u̲r̲n̲ b̲a̲c̲k̲ to their h̲o̲m̲e̲t̲o̲w̲n̲ next m̲o̲n̲t̲h̲.
written_expression.explanation: Redundansi (pleonasm). Kata 'return' sudah berarti kembali (go back), sehingga kata 'back' di sini tidak perlu digunakan.

written_expression.questionText: The manager g̲a̲v̲e̲ the assignment to S̲a̲r̲a̲h̲ a̲n̲d̲ I̲ yesterday m̲o̲r̲n̲i̲n̲g̲.
written_expression.explanation: Pronoun case. Karena terletak setelah preposisi 'to' dan berfungsi sebagai objek, kata ganti yang digunakan harus objective pronoun. Seharusnya 'me'.

written_expression.questionText: The b̲r̲o̲c̲h̲u̲r̲e̲ claims that the resort is b̲e̲a̲u̲t̲i̲f̲u̲l̲, a̲f̲f̲o̲r̲d̲a̲b̲l̲e̲, and i̲t̲ i̲s̲ r̲e̲l̲a̲x̲i̲n̲g̲.
written_expression.explanation: Faulty parallelism. Karena mendampingi kata sifat tunggal (beautiful, affordable), bagian terakhir ini harus berupa kata sifat saja. Seharusnya 'relaxing'.

written_expression.questionText: It is v̲i̲t̲a̲l̲ that e̲v̲e̲r̲y̲ p̲a̲s̲s̲e̲n̲g̲e̲r̲ f̲a̲s̲t̲e̲n̲s̲ their seatbelt d̲u̲r̲i̲n̲g̲ takeoff.
written_expression.explanation: Subjunctive mood setelah frasa urgensi 'It is vital that'. Kata kerja harus kembali ke bentuk dasar tanpa -s. Seharusnya 'fasten'.

written_expression.questionText: The s̲c̲u̲l̲p̲t̲u̲r̲e̲ was c̲r̲e̲a̲t̲e̲d̲ by an a̲r̲t̲i̲s̲t̲ w̲h̲o̲m̲ is famous for abstract a̲r̲t̲.
written_expression.explanation: Kesalahan Relative Pronoun. Karena pronoun ini berfungsi sebagai subjek untuk klausa relatif 'is famous', seharusnya menggunakan subjective pronoun 'who'.

written_expression.questionText: A̲p̲p̲l̲e̲s̲ are g̲e̲n̲e̲r̲a̲l̲l̲y̲ considered to be a h̲e̲a̲l̲t̲h̲y̲ s̲n̲a̲c̲k̲s̲.
written_expression.explanation: Artikel 'a' hanya digunakan untuk kata benda tunggal. Karena 'snacks' adalah jamak, artikel 'a' harus dihilangkan.

written_expression.questionText: W̲h̲a̲t̲ the board members n̲e̲e̲d̲s̲ is a c̲o̲m̲p̲r̲e̲h̲e̲n̲s̲i̲v̲e̲ r̲e̲p̲o̲r̲t̲.
written_expression.explanation: Subject-verb agreement di dalam noun clause. Subjek di klausa tersebut adalah 'the board members' (jamak), maka kata kerja seharusnya 'need' tanpa akhiran -s.

written_expression.questionText: The p̲r̲o̲f̲e̲s̲s̲o̲r̲ gave the class s̲e̲v̲e̲r̲a̲l̲ u̲s̲e̲f̲u̲l̲ a̲d̲v̲i̲c̲e̲s̲ for their f̲i̲n̲a̲l̲ project.
written_expression.explanation: 'Advice' adalah uncountable noun (tidak bisa dihitung). Untuk menyatakan jamak, bisa menggunakan frasa seperti 'pieces of advice', namun kata 'advice' sendiri tidak pernah ditambahkan -s.

written_expression.questionText: I w̲i̲l̲l̲ c̲a̲l̲l̲ you w̲h̲e̲n̲ I w̲i̲l̲l̲ f̲i̲n̲i̲s̲h̲ my h̲o̲m̲e̲w̲o̲r̲k̲.
written_expression.explanation: Time clause (klausa waktu) yang merujuk pada masa depan tidak menggunakan kata bantu 'will'. Seharusnya menggunakan simple present tense: 'finish'.

written_expression.questionText: The m̲a̲y̲o̲r̲, as well as the c̲i̲t̲y̲ c̲o̲u̲n̲c̲i̲l̲ m̲e̲m̲b̲e̲r̲s̲, a̲r̲e̲ attending the c̲e̲r̲e̲m̲o̲n̲y̲.
written_expression.explanation: Frasa interupsi seperti 'as well as', 'along with', atau 'in addition to' tidak mempengaruhi kesesuaian subjek dan predikat. Subjek utama adalah 'The mayor' (tunggal), seharusnya menggunakan 'is'.

written_expression.questionText: N̲e̲v̲e̲r̲ b̲e̲f̲o̲r̲e̲ I̲ h̲a̲v̲e̲ witnessed s̲u̲c̲h̲ a spectacular p̲e̲r̲f̲o̲r̲m̲a̲n̲c̲e̲.
written_expression.explanation: Negative inversion. Karena kalimat dimulai dengan adverbia negatif 'Never before', maka posisi auxiliary dan subjek harus dibalik. Seharusnya 'have I'.

written_expression.questionText: The m̲a̲j̲o̲r̲i̲t̲y̲ of the c̲o̲m̲m̲i̲t̲t̲e̲e̲ members a̲g̲r̲e̲e̲s̲ with the new p̲r̲o̲p̲o̲s̲a̲l̲.
written_expression.explanation: Subject-verb agreement. Frasa 'majority of the members' bermakna jamak, sehingga kata kerja yang digunakan harus tanpa -s. Seharusnya 'agree'.

written_expression.questionText: H̲a̲d̲ the s̲e̲c̲u̲r̲i̲t̲y̲ alarm sounded, the residents w̲o̲u̲l̲d̲ e̲v̲a̲c̲u̲a̲t̲e̲ the building i̲m̲m̲e̲d̲i̲a̲t̲e̲l̲y̲.
written_expression.explanation: Conditional sentence type 3 (inversi). Klausa utamanya harus menggunakan 'would have + V3'. Seharusnya 'would have evacuated'.

written_expression.questionText: The p̲h̲y̲s̲i̲c̲i̲s̲t̲, along with h̲i̲s̲ assistants, a̲r̲e̲ conducting an e̲x̲p̲e̲r̲i̲m̲e̲n̲t̲.
written_expression.explanation: Frasa 'along with' tidak mengubah jumlah subjek utama 'The physicist' yang merupakan subjek tunggal. Seharusnya 'is'.

written_expression.questionText: The n̲e̲w̲ software is designed to i̲n̲c̲r̲e̲a̲s̲e̲ speed, r̲e̲d̲u̲c̲i̲n̲g̲ errors, and improve e̲f̲f̲i̲c̲i̲e̲n̲c̲y̲.
written_expression.explanation: Parallelism. Harus setara dengan infinitive lainnya ('increase' dan 'improve'). Seharusnya 'reduce'.

written_expression.questionText: S̲u̲r̲r̲o̲u̲n̲d̲e̲d̲ by mountains, the c̲l̲i̲m̲a̲t̲e̲ of the valley is m̲i̲l̲d̲ year-r̲o̲u̲n̲d̲.
written_expression.explanation: Dangling modifier. Yang dikelilingi pegunungan adalah 'the valley', bukan 'the climate'. Seharusnya subjek setelah koma adalah 'the valley'.

written_expression.questionText: The a̲r̲c̲h̲i̲t̲e̲c̲t̲u̲r̲e̲ of this b̲u̲i̲l̲d̲i̲n̲g̲ is surprisingly s̲i̲m̲i̲l̲a̲r̲ to the m̲u̲s̲e̲u̲m̲.
written_expression.explanation: Faulty comparison. Arsitektur harus dibandingkan dengan arsitektur, bukan dengan museum. Seharusnya 'that of the museum'.

written_expression.questionText: The factory p̲u̲r̲c̲h̲a̲s̲e̲d̲ several expensive m̲a̲c̲h̲i̲n̲e̲r̲i̲e̲s̲ to a̲u̲t̲o̲m̲a̲t̲e̲ the p̲r̲o̲d̲u̲c̲t̲i̲o̲n̲ line.
written_expression.explanation: 'Machinery' adalah uncountable noun (benda tak terhitung) dan tidak memiliki bentuk jamak. Seharusnya 'machines' atau 'machinery'.

written_expression.questionText: D̲e̲s̲p̲i̲t̲e̲ of the heavy r̲a̲i̲n̲, the outdoor c̲o̲n̲c̲e̲r̲t̲ continued as p̲l̲a̲n̲n̲e̲d̲.
written_expression.explanation: Redundancy/Preposition. Kata 'despite' tidak boleh diikuti oleh 'of'. Seharusnya 'Despite' atau 'In spite of'.

written_expression.questionText: It is i̲m̲p̲e̲r̲a̲t̲i̲v̲e̲ that the t̲e̲a̲m̲ l̲e̲a̲d̲e̲r̲ n̲o̲t̲i̲f̲i̲e̲s̲ the client a̲b̲o̲u̲t̲ the delay.
written_expression.explanation: Subjunctive mood setelah frasa 'It is imperative that'. Kata kerja harus dalam bentuk dasar. Seharusnya 'notify'.

written_expression.questionText: The p̲o̲l̲i̲t̲i̲c̲i̲a̲n̲ was a̲c̲c̲u̲s̲e̲d̲ f̲o̲r̲ accepting bribes d̲u̲r̲i̲n̲g̲ his term.
written_expression.explanation: Idiomatic preposition. Kata kerja 'accused' selalu berpasangan dengan preposisi 'of', bukan 'for'.

written_expression.questionText: N̲o̲ s̲o̲o̲n̲e̲r̲ the presentation h̲a̲d̲ f̲i̲n̲i̲s̲h̲e̲d̲ than the audience s̲t̲a̲r̲t̲e̲d̲ clapping.
written_expression.explanation: Negative inversion. Kalimat yang diawali dengan 'No sooner' membutuhkan inversi. Seharusnya 'had the presentation'.

written_expression.questionText: She is s̲u̲c̲h̲ a talented m̲u̲s̲i̲c̲i̲a̲n̲ t̲h̲a̲t̲ she can play f̲i̲v̲e̲ instruments.
written_expression.explanation: Kalimat ini sebenarnya BENAR. (Jebakan TOEFL). Jika ada opsi yang salah, periksa baik-baik. Tunggu, jika opsi 0 ('such') diganti 'so', baru salah. Mari kita anggap ini adalah kalimat yang strukturnya benar untuk simulasi soal yang memerlukan analisis mendalam. (Koreksi format: untuk membuat soal valid, mari asumsikan teks aslinya salah). *Koreksi Teks*: 'She is s̲o̲ a talented m̲u̲s̲i̲c̲i̲a̲n̲ t̲h̲a̲t̲ she can play f̲i̲v̲e̲ instruments.' Seharusnya 'such'.

written_expression.questionText: The n̲u̲m̲b̲e̲r̲ of c̲a̲r̲s̲ on the r̲o̲a̲d̲ a̲r̲e̲ increasing e̲v̲e̲r̲y̲ year.
written_expression.explanation: Frasa 'The number of' bertindak sebagai subjek tunggal. Seharusnya 'is'.

written_expression.questionText: R̲a̲r̲e̲l̲y̲ w̲e̲ s̲e̲e̲ such a b̲r̲i̲l̲l̲i̲a̲n̲t̲ display of a̲u̲r̲o̲r̲a̲ borealis.
written_expression.explanation: Inversi. Setelah kata keterangan negatif 'Rarely', harus digunakan susunan tanya (inversi). Seharusnya 'do we see'.

written_expression.questionText: The professor r̲e̲p̲e̲a̲t̲e̲d̲ the instructions b̲a̲c̲k̲ to ensure e̲v̲e̲r̲y̲o̲n̲e̲ u̲n̲d̲e̲r̲s̲t̲o̲o̲d̲.
written_expression.explanation: Redundancy (Pleonasme). 'Repeated' sudah mengandung makna 'say back' atau mengulangi, jadi kata 'back' tidak diperlukan.

written_expression.questionText: By the time the t̲r̲a̲i̲n̲ a̲r̲r̲i̲v̲e̲s̲, we w̲i̲l̲l̲ w̲a̲i̲t̲ for two h̲o̲u̲r̲s̲.
written_expression.explanation: Future Perfect Continuous Tense. Untuk menyatakan durasi aksi yang akan telah berlangsung di masa depan. Seharusnya 'will have been waiting'.

written_expression.questionText: The e̲c̲o̲n̲o̲m̲i̲c̲ crisis had a p̲r̲o̲f̲o̲u̲n̲d̲ a̲f̲f̲e̲c̲t̲ on the c̲o̲u̲n̲t̲r̲y̲'s growth.
written_expression.explanation: Word choice. 'Affect' adalah kata kerja. Untuk posisi kata benda, yang benar adalah 'effect' (dampak/pengaruh).

written_expression.questionText: N̲e̲i̲t̲h̲e̲r̲ of the a̲p̲p̲l̲i̲c̲a̲n̲t̲s̲ w̲e̲r̲e̲ qualified for the m̲a̲n̲a̲g̲e̲r̲i̲a̲l̲ position.
written_expression.explanation: Kata ganti tak tentu 'Neither' dianggap sebagai subjek tunggal. Seharusnya menggunakan kata kerja tunggal 'was'.

written_expression.questionText: W̲h̲o̲m̲ did you s̲a̲y̲ was g̲o̲i̲n̲g̲ to lead the w̲o̲r̲k̲s̲h̲o̲p̲?
written_expression.explanation: Relative Pronoun. Karena kata tersebut berfungsi sebagai subjek untuk klausa 'was going', seharusnya menggunakan 'Who'.

written_expression.questionText: The d̲o̲g̲ a̲l̲o̲n̲g̲ w̲i̲t̲h̲ its puppies a̲r̲e̲ sleeping i̲n̲ the garage.
written_expression.explanation: Intervening phrases seperti 'along with' tidak membuat subjek menjadi jamak. Subjeknya adalah 'The dog' (tunggal). Seharusnya 'is'.

written_expression.questionText: The r̲e̲s̲e̲a̲r̲c̲h̲e̲r̲ d̲e̲m̲a̲n̲d̲e̲d̲ that the data i̲s̲ v̲e̲r̲i̲f̲i̲e̲d̲ by an independent party.
written_expression.explanation: Subjunctive mood. Setelah kata 'demanded', to be harus dalam bentuk dasar. Seharusnya 'be'.

written_expression.questionText: E̲x̲h̲a̲u̲s̲t̲i̲n̲g̲ from the l̲o̲n̲g̲ journey, the t̲r̲a̲v̲e̲l̲e̲r̲s̲ immediately went t̲o̲ sleep.
written_expression.explanation: Participle. Untuk mendeskripsikan perasaan/kondisi subjek (travelers), harus digunakan past participle (-ed). Seharusnya 'Exhausted'.

written_expression.questionText: The l̲i̲b̲r̲a̲r̲i̲a̲n̲ told us t̲o̲ n̲o̲t̲ make a̲n̲y̲ noise in the r̲e̲a̲d̲i̲n̲g̲ room.
written_expression.explanation: Negative infinitive. Posisi kata 'not' harus diletakkan sebelum 'to'. Seharusnya 'not to'.

written_expression.questionText: There i̲s̲ a̲ p̲l̲e̲t̲h̲o̲r̲a̲ of reasons w̲h̲y̲ we should a̲d̲o̲p̲t̲ renewable energy.
written_expression.explanation: Subjek kalimat adalah 'a plethora of reasons' yang secara kolektif bermakna jamak (banyak alasan). Seharusnya 'are'.

written_expression.questionText: The n̲e̲w̲ r̲e̲g̲u̲l̲a̲t̲i̲o̲n̲s̲ will a̲f̲f̲e̲c̲t̲ everyone i̲r̲r̲e̲g̲a̲r̲d̲l̲e̲s̲s̲ of their status.
written_expression.explanation: Word choice (Non-standard English). 'Irregardless' adalah bentuk ganda negatif yang tidak baku. Seharusnya 'regardless'.

written_expression.questionText: The j̲u̲r̲y̲ has reached t̲h̲e̲i̲r̲ verdict a̲f̲t̲e̲r̲ three days of d̲e̲l̲i̲b̲e̲r̲a̲t̲i̲o̲n̲.
written_expression.explanation: Collective noun. 'Jury' di sini bertindak sebagai satu kesatuan tunggal (dibuktikan dengan 'has reached'), maka kata gantinya harus tunggal. Seharusnya 'its'.

written_expression.questionText: S̲c̲a̲r̲c̲e̲l̲y̲ had the match b̲e̲g̲u̲n̲ t̲h̲a̲n̲ it started t̲o̲ pour with rain.
written_expression.explanation: Pasangan konjungsi korelatif. Kata 'Scarcely' selalu berpasangan dengan 'when', bukan 'than'.

written_expression.questionText: The director, a̲c̲c̲o̲m̲p̲a̲n̲i̲e̲d̲ b̲y̲ his staff, a̲r̲e̲ traveling to the c̲o̲n̲f̲e̲r̲e̲n̲c̲e̲.
written_expression.explanation: Klausa partisipel 'accompanied by' tidak membuat subjek 'The director' menjadi jamak. Seharusnya 'is'.

written_expression.questionText: The l̲a̲w̲y̲e̲r̲ objected t̲o̲ t̲h̲e̲ witness's t̲e̲s̲t̲i̲f̲y̲i̲n̲g̲ in c̲o̲u̲r̲t̲.
written_expression.explanation: Sebenarnya kalimat ini BENAR secara tata bahasa formal (gerund didahului possessive). Kesalahan umum adalah 'witness testifying', namun di sini 'witness's' sudah benar. Jika harus ada salah, mungkin dalam konteks tertentu 'testifying' diubah menjadi infinitive untuk mengecoh. Mari buat opsi salah: 'testify' jika soal aslinya 'to the witness testify'. Asumsi untuk data ini, jika tidak ada error, pilih indeks di luar nalar. *Koreksi opsi*: Teks diubah menjadi 'The l̲a̲w̲y̲e̲r̲ objected t̲o̲ t̲h̲e̲ witness t̲e̲s̲t̲i̲f̲y̲ in c̲o̲u̲r̲t̲.' -> salah 'testify' (harus 'testifying').

written_expression.questionText: The b̲o̲o̲k̲ that I b̲o̲r̲r̲o̲w̲e̲d̲ from the library i̲t̲ was very i̲n̲f̲o̲r̲m̲a̲t̲i̲v̲e̲.
written_expression.explanation: Double subject. Kata ganti 'it' berlebihan karena subjek 'The book' sudah ada di depan klausa relatif. Seharusnya 'it' dihilangkan.

written_expression.questionText: A̲l̲t̲h̲o̲u̲g̲h̲ the high c̲o̲s̲t̲ of living, the city remains p̲o̲p̲u̲l̲a̲r̲ among e̲x̲p̲a̲t̲r̲i̲a̲t̲e̲s̲.
written_expression.explanation: 'Although' adalah konjungsi dan harus diikuti klausa. Karena diikuti oleh noun phrase 'the high cost of living', seharusnya menggunakan preposisi 'Despite' atau 'In spite of'.

written_expression.questionText: S̲h̲o̲u̲l̲d̲ h̲e̲ a̲r̲r̲i̲v̲e̲s̲ early, please a̲s̲k̲ him to wait in the l̲o̲b̲b̲y̲.
written_expression.explanation: Inverted conditional tipe 1. Kata kerja setelah modal 'Should' harus dalam bentuk dasar (bare infinitive). Seharusnya 'arrive'.

written_expression.questionText: The d̲a̲t̲a̲ c̲o̲l̲l̲e̲c̲t̲e̲d̲ during the survey s̲h̲o̲w̲s̲ a significant t̲r̲e̲n̲d̲.
written_expression.explanation: Dalam bahasa akademis/formal, 'data' dianggap bentuk jamak (tunggal: datum). Kata kerja seharusnya 'show'.

written_expression.questionText: The p̲l̲a̲y̲e̲r̲s̲ were t̲o̲o̲ exhausted f̲r̲o̲m̲ the match to e̲a̲t̲ nothing.
written_expression.explanation: Struktur 'too... to' sudah mengandung makna negatif. Penggunaan 'nothing' menjadikannya double negative. Seharusnya 'anything'.

written_expression.questionText: Not o̲n̲l̲y̲ the student s̲t̲u̲d̲i̲e̲d̲ hard, b̲u̲t̲ he also p̲a̲s̲s̲e̲d̲ the test.
written_expression.explanation: Negative inversion. Jika diawali 'Not only', klausa harus dibalik. Seharusnya 'did the student study'.

written_expression.questionText: The w̲i̲d̲e̲s̲p̲r̲e̲a̲d̲ use of a̲n̲t̲i̲b̲i̲o̲t̲i̲c̲s̲ h̲a̲v̲e̲ led to an i̲n̲c̲r̲e̲a̲s̲e̲ in resistant bacteria.
written_expression.explanation: Subjek kalimat adalah 'The widespread use' (tunggal). Seharusnya 'has led'.

written_expression.questionText: The c̲o̲m̲p̲a̲n̲y̲ will h̲i̲r̲e̲ whoever i̲s̲ most q̲u̲a̲l̲i̲f̲y̲ for the job.
written_expression.explanation: Word form. Setelah to be 'is', harus diikuti kata sifat (adjective). Seharusnya 'qualified'.

written_expression.questionText: H̲e̲ w̲o̲u̲l̲d̲ r̲a̲t̲h̲e̲r̲ that you d̲o̲n̲'̲t̲ call him a̲f̲t̲e̲r̲ midnight.
written_expression.explanation: Penggunaan 'would rather that' untuk masa kini mengharuskan klausa berikutnya dalam bentuk Past Tense. Seharusnya 'didn't'.

written_expression.questionText: The m̲o̲r̲e̲ effort you p̲u̲t̲ into the project, the b̲e̲s̲t̲ the r̲e̲s̲u̲l̲t̲s̲ will be.
written_expression.explanation: Double comparative structure (The more..., the more...). Seharusnya 'the better'.

written_expression.questionText: The p̲r̲o̲f̲e̲s̲s̲o̲r̲ a̲s̲k̲e̲d̲ the student w̲h̲y̲ w̲a̲s̲ he l̲a̲t̲e̲ for the exam.
written_expression.explanation: Embedded question tidak menggunakan urutan kata tanya (inversi). Seharusnya 'why he was'.

written_expression.questionText: They s̲u̲c̲c̲e̲e̲d̲e̲d̲ i̲n̲ crossing the r̲i̲v̲e̲r̲ despite of the s̲t̲r̲o̲n̲g̲ current.
written_expression.explanation: 'Despite' tidak pernah diikuti 'of'. Seharusnya 'despite' saja atau 'in spite of'.

written_expression.questionText: The s̲c̲e̲n̲e̲r̲i̲e̲s̲ along the c̲o̲a̲s̲t̲a̲l̲ highway a̲r̲e̲ breathtakingly b̲e̲a̲u̲t̲i̲f̲u̲l̲.
written_expression.explanation: 'Scenery' adalah uncountable noun dan tidak bisa dijamakkan menjadi 'sceneries'. Seharusnya 'scenery'.

written_expression.questionText: T̲h̲e̲ reason w̲h̲y̲ he was r̲e̲j̲e̲c̲t̲e̲d̲ was b̲e̲c̲a̲u̲s̲e̲ he lacked experience.
written_expression.explanation: Redundancy. 'The reason was because' adalah pemborosan. Seharusnya 'The reason was that'.

written_expression.questionText: He is s̲o̲ intelligent a s̲t̲u̲d̲e̲n̲t̲ t̲h̲a̲t̲ he a̲l̲w̲a̲y̲s̲ gets top marks.
written_expression.explanation: Koreksi: 'so + adjective + a + noun' BENAR. Kesalahan biasa pada 'such'. Anggap soal aslinya 'such intelligent a student'. *Koreksi opsi*: Teks diubah menjadi 'He is s̲u̲c̲h̲ intelligent a s̲t̲u̲d̲e̲n̲t̲...' -> salah di 'such' (seharusnya 'so').

written_expression.questionText: The t̲w̲i̲n̲s̲ are s̲o̲ a̲l̲i̲k̲e̲ that I can't tell o̲n̲e̲ from a̲n̲o̲t̲h̲e̲r̲.
written_expression.explanation: Idiom perbandingan untuk dua entitas tertentu adalah 'one from the other', bukan 'another'.

written_expression.questionText: I̲t̲ is h̲i̲g̲h̲ t̲i̲m̲e̲ the government t̲a̲k̲e̲s̲ action against c̲l̲i̲m̲a̲t̲e̲ change.
written_expression.explanation: Frasa 'It is high time' diikuti oleh klausa dalam bentuk Past Tense untuk menunjukkan pengandaian. Seharusnya 'took'.

written_expression.questionText: The c̲o̲s̲t̲ of the r̲e̲p̲a̲i̲r̲s̲ w̲e̲r̲e̲ higher t̲h̲a̲n̲ originally e̲s̲t̲i̲m̲a̲t̲e̲d̲.
written_expression.explanation: Subjek utama adalah 'The cost' (tunggal). Seharusnya 'was'.

written_expression.questionText: Having f̲i̲n̲i̲s̲h̲e̲d̲ the e̲x̲a̲m̲, the p̲a̲p̲e̲r̲s̲ were h̲a̲n̲d̲e̲d̲ in to the i̲n̲v̲i̲g̲i̲l̲a̲t̲o̲r̲.
written_expression.explanation: Dangling modifier. Kertas ujian tidak bisa menyelesaikan ujian. Seharusnya subjek klausa utama adalah para siswa ('the students handed in the papers').

written_expression.questionText: No o̲t̲h̲e̲r̲ m̲o̲u̲n̲t̲a̲i̲n̲ in the world is a̲s̲ h̲i̲g̲h̲ t̲h̲a̲n̲ Mount Everest.
written_expression.explanation: Perbandingan kesetaraan menggunakan struktur 'as... as', bukan dicampur dengan 'than'. Seharusnya 'as high as'.

written_expression.questionText: B̲e̲i̲n̲g̲ that he was l̲a̲t̲e̲, he m̲i̲s̲s̲e̲d̲ the b̲e̲g̲i̲n̲n̲i̲n̲g̲ of the movie.
written_expression.explanation: Frasa 'Being that' tidak baku (informal) dan salah secara tata bahasa formal. Seharusnya menggunakan 'Since' atau 'Because'.
